goldenshovel.en: I can't wait to dig holes.

palmcone_scale.en: If trees had toenails, I imagine they'd look like this.
palmcone_scale.trans: 如果树有脚趾甲，大抵该是这样吧。

target_too_far_away.en: They might be too far away for him to sniff out.
target_too_far_away.trans: 它们可能离得太远，他嗅不到味道。

tracking_not_mine.en: He's leading the way for someone else.

nothing_to_track.en: It doesn't look like there's anything left to find.
nothing_to_track.trans: 看起来没有什么可找的了。

abandoned.en: I'm sure I can find them on my own.
abandoned.trans: 我一定能靠自己找到它们。

generic.en: He looks like he knows what he's doing!
generic.trans: 他看起来好像知道自己在做什么！

feather_crow.en: A feather from a black bird.

empty.en: Maybe it would like a feather to play with...
empty.trans: 也许它想弄根羽毛来玩玩……

halloweencandy_10.en: Only a sucker wouldn't love this.
halloweencandy_10.trans: 只有傻瓜才不会爱上这东西。

halloweencandy_11.en: Much better tasting than the real thing.
halloweencandy_11.trans: 比真的东西尝起来味道好多了。

quagmire_pot_syrup.en: I need to sweeten this pot.
quagmire_pot_syrup.trans: 我需要给这锅东西增加甜味。

mask_dollrepairedhat.en: It was a doll mask at one point.
mask_dollrepairedhat.trans: 这是一张曾经的玩偶面具。

redmooneye.en: It can see and be seen for miles!
redmooneye.trans: 它能看几公里，也能在几公里外被看到。

wereitem_beaver.en: I guess science works differently up North.
wereitem_beaver.trans: 我猜科学在北方有不同的奏效方法。

boat_rotator.en: Things are going in the right direction. Or maybe the left.
boat_rotator.trans: 事情正朝着正确的方向发展。这个方向非左即右。

wrong_tile.en: I don't think it's getting the required nutrients here.
wrong_tile.trans: 这里给不了它所需的营养。

wrong_season.en: It seems like it fits in, but it's not yet ready to grow.
wrong_season.trans: 它看起来很适合，但还没准备要生长。

generic.en: It's cute, but it's not ripe yet.

wx78module_movespeed2.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

wx78module_light.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_light.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

general.en: That rabbit can really light up a room.
general.trans: 那只兔子真的可以点亮一个房间。

out.en: That rabbit isn't lighting up anything.

general.en: That rabbit can really light up a room.
general.trans: 那只兔子真的可以点亮一个房间。

out.en: That rabbit isn't lighting up anything.

mulleddrink.en: This punch has a kick to it.

petals_evil.en: I'm not sure I want to hold those.

fishmeat_dried.en: That fish is a real jerk.

pumpkincarver.en: Who's up for a gourd time?
pumpkincarver.trans: 有没有人要参与一个顶瓜瓜的项目？

picked.en: It'll take awhile to grow more fruit.
picked.trans: 得过些时间才能结出果实。

generic.en: It's a bush... from the moon!

barren.en: Its fruit growing days are over.

meatysalad.trans: 屈屈一份沙拉，居然这么顶饱。

escaped.en: Looks like something was caught, but it escaped...
escaped.trans: 好像是抓到了，但又被它跑掉了……

fixed.en: All ready to catch fish again!

generic.en: There's a faint warmth coming from inside.

lavaarena_armorheavy.en: That's as good as it gets.

antlionhat.trans: 这是一项破土而出的科学成就。

picked.en: I wonder if it will come back?
picked.trans: 不知道它会不会长回来？

monkeyisland_portal.en: Nothing can get in, but it keeps spitting things out.
monkeyisland_portal.trans: 没有东西可以进入，它会不断地吐出东西。

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

drying_notmeat.en: Drying things is not an exact science.

dryinginrain.en: Drying takes even longer in rain.

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: Rain, rain, go away. Be wet again another day.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 雨啊，快走开。想下，改天来。

done_notmeat.en: In laboratory terms, we would call that "dry".
done_notmeat.trans: 实验术语里，我们管它叫“干燥”。

umbrella.en: I always hate when my hair gets wet and poofy.

adventure_portal.en: I'm not sure I want to fall for that a second time.

generic.en: How's that for an icy gaze?

treeclump.en: It's almost like someone is trying to prevent me from going somewhere.
treeclump.trans: 是不是有人想把我困在这里。

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 我有的都是闪闪发光的好主意。

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: I'll want to avoid stepping on that!

quagmire_casseroledish_small.trans: 可以做各种杂七杂八的小菜。

ocean_trawler_kit.en: I should put it somewhere with lots of fish.
ocean_trawler_kit.trans: 我应该把它放在有很多鱼的地方。

saltrock.en: Science compels me to lick it.

sleeping.trans: 它都不偷偷睁眼看一下。

wx78module_movespeed.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

yotd_anchor.en: I wouldn't want my boat to fly away.
yotd_anchor.trans: 我可不能让我的小船飞走了。

salty_dog.en: Who's a proud little seal pup?

spear_gungnir.en: I could do a quick charge with that.

forgetmelots.en: Hm. I can't remember what I was going to say about those.
forgetmelots.trans: 嗯，我不记得我想说什么了。

wetpaper.en: I hope it dries off soon.

generic.en: Why study when I can experiment?

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 一个即将到来的船用保险杠。

razor.en: A sharpened rock tied to a stick. For hygiene!
razor.trans: 绑在棍子上的磨利的石头。为了个人卫生！

kitcoon_moon.en: I must collect more... for research!
kitcoon_moon.trans: 我必须多收集点……做研究！

slingshot_frame_gems.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

pudgy.en: Hmmm, there may be too much food inside it.
pudgy.trans: 嗯，它可能吃太多东西了。

domesticated.en: This one is slightly less smelly than the others.

rider.trans: 这家伙看起来挺好骑的。

sleeping.en: These guys are really heavy sleepers.

quagmire_oven.en: It needs ingredients to make the science work.
quagmire_oven.trans: 需要加些材料才会有化学反应。

playing.en: Science compels me to press that big shiny button!
playing.trans: 科学迫使我按下那个闪亮的大按钮！

generic.en: It won't let me play until I give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 它要我给它一些闪亮的东西才让我玩。

coolant.trans: 它的气泡里充满了可能性！

wetpouch.en: This package is barely holding together.
wetpouch.trans: 这个包裹只能勉强绑在一起。

powder_monkey.en: Don't you dare monkey around with my boat!
powder_monkey.trans: 泼猴你敢在我的小船上撒野！

bird_mutant_spitter.en: I don't like the way it's looking at me...
bird_mutant_spitter.trans: 我不喜欢它盯着我的眼神……

dustmoth.trans: 真是些整齐的小家伙，不是吗？

greenstaff.trans: 这东西迟早派得上用场。

generic.en: I think it could fall over any moment.

pumpkin_cooked.en: How did it not turn into a pie?

generic.en: It's a den in a stump.

empty.en: Its owner ran out of lives.

wathgrithr_improvedhat.en: Does Wigfrid have any leadership experience? Or is she just winging it?
wathgrithr_improvedhat.trans: 薇格弗德有领导经验吗？又让她如虎添翼了？

yotc_carrat_race_start.en: It's a good enough place to start.

oceantree_pillar.en: It's not quite as great as the original, but still pretty good.
oceantree_pillar.trans: 虽然不如原来那个那么好，但还是挺不错的。

firestarter.en: That doesn't look like a campfire, %s.
firestarter.trans: 那个看起来可不像是营火，%s。

ghost.en: I know you're having fun, but we'd best find a heart.
ghost.trans: 我知道你玩的很开心，但是我们要去找一颗心。

murderer.en: Did you run out of material for your stories, %s?
murderer.trans: 你的故事素材用完了吗，%s？

attacker.en: Is that how a Pinetree Pioneer is meant to behave?
attacker.trans: 这是松树先锋队员该做的事吗？

reviver.en: I can always count on %s.

burnt.en: I suppose we'll never know what it was for now.
burnt.trans: 永远都不会这道它原来是什么了。

moonglass_wobster_den.en: It's a chunk of moonglass with Lunar Wobsters in it.
moonglass_wobster_den.trans: 一块月光玻璃，里面有月光龙虾。

armor_lunarplant.en: This armor doesn't leaf any room for improvement.
armor_lunarplant.trans: 这盔甲再叶没有改进空间了。

record_creepyforest.en: A whole song on one record? Technology has come so far.
record_creepyforest.trans: 一张唱片能录一整首歌？技术已经走到了这一步。

unagi.en: I hope this doesn't make anyone eel!
unagi.trans: 希望这不会让任何人变为鳗鱼！

slingshot_frame_bone.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 一个即将到来的船用保险杠。

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: This really is a pop-up carnival.
carnivalgame_memory_kit.trans: 这还真是个快闪嘉年华。

watermelonhat.en: Let the juice run down your face.
watermelonhat.trans: 让果汁从你的脸上流下。

slingshot_handle_sticky.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

monkeytail.en: I wonder if they're edible? Maybe an experiment is in order.
monkeytail.trans: 不知道能不能吃？看来要安排一个实验了。

generic.en: It's probably a tuft of grass.

strawhat.trans: 帽子总是会弄乱我的发型。

generic.en: Those kits are so easily distracted. Now what was I doing again?
generic.trans: 这些小家伙总是三心二意。我要干什么来着？

generic.en: It's not a real bird, but the kits don't know that.
generic.trans: 不是真鸟，但那些小家伙根本分不清。

boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.en: One more thing to check off my list.
boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.trans: 我的清单上又多了一件要检查的事。

cotl_trinket.trans: 这是多么了不起的成就啊。

undrawn.en: We should draw something on there.
undrawn.trans: 我们应该在那上面画些东西。

generic.en: I could draw better than that!

lavaarena_armorextraheavy.en: This armor has been petrified for maximum protection.
lavaarena_armorextraheavy.trans: 这副盔甲已经石化，提供最大程度的保护。

cutless.en: What it lacks in slicing it makes up for in splinters.
cutless.trans: 虽然它切不了东西，但是它木刺多呀。

pocketwatch_parts.en: Wait a minute, this is starting to look more like magic than science!
pocketwatch_parts.trans: 还没过一分钟，已经从科学变成了魔法！

blowdart_pipe.en: Good practice for my birthday cake!
blowdart_pipe.trans: 我可以好好练习怎么吹生日蜡烛！

empty.en: Hm... what makes a beefalo?
empty.trans: 嗯……皮弗娄牛是什么做的呢？

record_drstyle.en: A whole song on one record? Technology has come so far.
record_drstyle.trans: 一张唱片能录一整首歌？技术已经走到了这一步。

skeletonhat.trans: 它给我带来可怕的幻象。

mutator_hider.en: Oh wow, that looks um... delicious, Webber!
mutator_hider.trans: 哦，哇，这看起来嗯……很好吃，韦伯!

undrawn.en: I should draw something in this.
undrawn.trans: 我应该画点东西在里面。

ghost.en: I always thought %s could use a heart. Now I'm certain!
ghost.trans: 我一直认为%s该长点心。现在，我很确定！

firestarter.en: You look like you're gonna melt, %s. What happened?
firestarter.trans: %s！你看起来快融化了。发生什么事？

attacker.en: I think we need to tweak your primary directive, %s...
attacker.trans: %s，我想我们得调整你的首要指令...

reviver.en: I guess %s got that empathy module up and running.
reviver.trans: 我猜是%s让感同身受组件启动并运行。

moon_altar_cosmic.en: It feels like it's waiting for something.
moon_altar_cosmic.trans: 感觉它在等什么事情发生。

eyeturret.en: I hope it doesn't turn on me.

formal_blueprint.en: This is a costume for some Grade A beefalo.
formal_blueprint.trans: 这是A级皮弗娄牛的专属礼服。

held.en: I'll keep a little light in my pocket.
held.trans: 我要在口袋里装一点光。

generic.en: Hasn't a care in the world.

beefalohat.en: That's a case of hat-hair waiting to happen.
beefalohat.trans: 可以预见，我的发型要被帽子毁了。

glass.en: Water turns to glass under the moon. That's just science.
glass.trans: 水在月光下凝结成玻璃，这就是科学。

generic.en: If only I could soak my weary bones.
generic.trans: 能泡下这身疲倦的身骨该多好。

empty.en: I'll just have to wait for it to fill up again.
empty.trans: 那我就等等它再变满吧。

fence_gate.en: It opens. And closes sometimes, too.

hermit_bundle.en: She shore shells out a lot of these.

marblebean.en: I traded the old family cow for it.

playbill_the_princess_yoth.en: Hoof you seen this one yet?

mutator_moon.en: Oh wow, that looks um... delicious, Webber!
mutator_moon.trans: 哦，哇，这看起来嗯……很好吃，韦伯!

oceanvine_cocoon_burnt.trans: 闻到了吐司烧焦的味道。

ice_blueprint.en: I usually like my beefalo fresh, not frozen.
ice_blueprint.trans: 我喜欢新鲜的皮弗娄牛，不是冷冻的。

spider_healer.en: Oh wonderful. Now the spiders can heal themselves.
spider_healer.trans: 哦，太好了。现在蜘蛛可以自愈了。

friendlyfruitfly.en: The garden seems happier with it around.
friendlyfruitfly.trans: 有它在，花园似乎更开心了。

generic.trans: 看起来比平常的蜘蛛更凶恶。

generic.en: I've got my eyes on the prize. That one, over there!
generic.trans: 我已经看到了我想要的奖品。就是那边那个！

boat_item.en: It would be nice to do some experiments on the water.
boat_item.trans: 在水上做些实验挺不错的。

generic.en: My brain pulses with peace and terror.
generic.trans: 平静和恐惧同时在我的脑中回响。

nolight.en: The cracks in this place are starting to show.
nolight.trans: 这个地方的裂隙越来越明显。

picked.en: I can't get anymore out of that shrub.
picked.trans: 从那丛灌木中采集不到更多果实了。

generic.en: It reminds me of those tentacle monsters.
generic.trans: 它让我想起来那些带触手的怪物。

hammered.en: I don't think it's supposed to look like that.

generic.en: Produces a lot of heat, but not much light.
generic.trans: 产生了大量的热量，但亮光却不多。

healingsalve.en: The stinging means that it's working.
healingsalve.trans: 有点儿刺痛感就说明它起作用了。

marbletree.en: I don't think an axe will cut it.

quagmire_park_fountain.en: Been a long time since it was hooked up to water.
quagmire_park_fountain.trans: 它和水连在一起很长时间了。

waterplant_planter.en: They seem to grow best on oceanic rocks.
waterplant_planter.trans: 它们在大海中的岩石上长的最好。

sketch.en: A picture of a sculpture. We'll need somewhere to make it.
sketch.trans: 一张雕像的图片。要找个地方才能做出来。

humanmeat.en: Flesh is flesh. Where do I draw the line?

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: I could watch it for hours.
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 我可以几个小时一直盯着它看。

mutator_healer.en: Ah, I... just ate! Why don't you give it to one of your spider friends?
mutator_healer.trans: 呃，我……刚吃过饭！你拿去给你的蜘蛛朋友好吗？

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: This really is a pop-up carnival.
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 这还真是个快闪嘉年华。

healingsalve_acid.en: This will salve a number of problems.

shadow_beef_bell.en: It's a dead ringer for my old beefalo bell.
shadow_beef_bell.trans: 这家伙长得就像我旧的那个皮弗娄牛铃。

smallmeat.en: A tiny chunk of dead animal.

drying_notmeat.en: Drying things is not an exact science.

drying.en: Meat takes a while to dry.

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: Rain, rain, go away. Be wet again another day.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 雨啊，快走开。想下，改天来。

dryinginrain.en: Meat takes even longer to dry in rain.
dryinginrain.trans: 雨天晾干肉需要更长时间。

done_notmeat.en: In laboratory terms, we would call that "dry".
done_notmeat.trans: 实验术语里，我们管它叫“干燥”。

generic.en: Those look like they could use some meat.
generic.trans: 肉晾在这里应该错不了。

beehat.en: Protects your skin, but squashes your meticulous coiffure.
beehat.trans: 保护你的皮肤，但会压坏你精心设计的发型。

winter_ornamentgorge.en: For some reason it makes me hungry.
winter_ornamentgorge.trans: 不知道为什么，这让我觉得很饿。

yoth_knighthat.en: Will I look like a foal?
yoth_knighthat.trans: 我戴会不会像匹小马驹？

yotp_food2.en: A meal only a beast would love.
yotp_food2.trans: 只有野兽才会喜欢的食物。

slingshot_handle_silk.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

armorsnurtleshell.en: It sticks to your back when you wear it.
armorsnurtleshell.trans: 穿这衣服时，会粘在背上。

chesspiece_crabking.en: Still not as crabby as Maxwell.
chesspiece_crabking.trans: 看着不如麦斯威尔脾气大。

kitcoon_yot.en: I must collect more... for research!
kitcoon_yot.trans: 我必须多收集点……做研究！

boat_rotator_kit.en: I think I'll take it out for a spin.
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 我想我要带它出去转转。

warg.en: You might be something to reckon with, big dog.
warg.trans: 你好像不太好对付啊，大狗。

quagmire_coin1.en: I'd like more than a penny for my thoughts.
quagmire_coin1.trans: 我的想法可值不止这点钱。

monkeyqueen.en: She looks like the top banana around here.
monkeyqueen.trans: 这片儿看起来是她说了算。

quagmire_coin4.en: We can use these to reopen the Gateway.
quagmire_coin4.trans: 可以用它们重新打开大门。

follower.en: This is all whale and good.

brokenhorn_follower.en: That's what happens when you nose around!
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 这就是你到处伸鼻子的下场！

generic.en: My, what a big horn you have.

unwritten.trans: 这块牌子现在是空白的。

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: This should improve my carrat's reaction time considerably.
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 这个应该能显著提高胡萝卜鼠的反应时间。

steeringwheel.en: I could have been a sailor in another life.

book_birds.en: No point studying when I can just wing it.

mast_item.en: Now I can build a mast.

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: This will help car-rate my car-rat.

barnacle.en: They don't look like knuckles to me.

polishcookie.en: I'll polish off this whole plate!

megaflare.en: It will let everything know I'm here. Everything.
megaflare.trans: 它会让一切存在都知道我在这里。一切存在。

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: I'd rather eat fish than crow.

pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 好一个漫长的下降过程。

mask_mirrorhat.en: It's a mask, but it looks like a mirror.
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 这是一张面具，但它看起来像一面镜子。

merm_tool.trans: 啥都能干，但又干啥啥不行。

slurper_pelt.en: Doesn't look all that much different dead.
slurper_pelt.trans: 死了的样子也没什么不同。

support_pillar_scaffold.en: It's all under wraps for now.
support_pillar_scaffold.trans: 目前一切都处于保密状态。

has_item_light.en: It's so average the scale isn't even bothering to tell me its weight.
has_item_light.trans: 它太一般了，秤都懒得告诉我它的重量。

burnt.en: I suppose that wasn't the best way to cook it.
burnt.trans: 我想这不是最好的烹饪方式。

generic.en: I can scientifically measure my harvest's heftiness.
generic.trans: 我可以科学地测算出收获的薄厚。

teleportato_crank.en: Tough enough to handle the most intense experiments.
teleportato_crank.trans: 结实到足以应付最危险的实验。

quagmire_trader_merm2.en: Maybe they'd be willing to trade.

archive_orchestrina_main.en: It's like they made it puzzling on purpose.
archive_orchestrina_main.trans: 好像专门做成让人摸不着头脑的样子。

shovel.en: There's a lot going on underground.

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: I'm sure there's some scientific explanation for this.
multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 我想这是有科学道理的。

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: I want to hug it, but the stone chafes.
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 我想抱抱它，但怕石头擦破皮。

pomegranate_oversized.en: That might be the biggest pomegranate I've ever seen.
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 这可能是我见过的最大的石榴。

woodcarvedhat.en: It looks like it's been lovingly carved.
woodcarvedhat.trans: 看起来像是经过精心雕刻的。

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: I hope this prize is all it's cracked up to be.

brush.en: I bet the beefalo really like this.
brush.trans: 皮弗娄牛肯定很喜欢这个。

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: Teeth? Doesn't seem all that hygenic.

sentryward.en: That's an entirely scientific mapping tool.

spoiled_food.en: It's a furry ball of rotten food.
spoiled_food.trans: 那是长满毛毛的腐烂食物。

short.en: It should hatch any time now.
short.trans: 它现在随时要孵出来了。

cold.en: Is it shivering or am I?
cold.trans: 是它在哆嗦还是我在哆嗦？

long.en: I have a feeling this is going to take a while...
long.trans: 我感觉这需要一些时间...

burning.en: That's what I call a firebird.

critter_puppy.en: Pretty cute for a lil monster!
critter_puppy.trans: 对一只小怪兽来说真是太可爱了！

sleep.en: She's made a sort of automatic defense system.
sleep.trans: 她制造了一种自动防卫系统。

generic.en: She's made a sort of automatic defense system.
generic.trans: 她制造了一种自动防卫系统。

moonrocknugget.en: That rock came from the moon.

boat_bumper_shell.en: It gives the boat a little shellf defense.
boat_bumper_shell.trans: 能给小船提供一个小的防御外壳。

chesspiece_moon.en: I've been feeling pretty inspired lately.

walking_stick.trans: 这是一根非常好的棍子。

perd.en: Stupid bird! Stay away from those berries!

construction1.en: The science has only just started.

construction2.en: That's looking much more science-y already!

generic.en: It's containing the energy! I knew what it was for all along, of course.
generic.trans: 它捕捉到能量了！当然，我一早就知道会这样。

idle.en: It seems to have found everything worth finding.
idle.trans: 它似乎找到了值得被找到的东西。

generic.en: Why use a map when you could use a mind-bogglingly complex piece of machinery?
generic.trans: 能用一个超级负责的机器，谁还要用地图？

batnosehat.trans: 有了它喝奶都不用动手了。

trident.en: This is going to be a blast!

walkingplank_ancient.en: Couldn't we have just made a lifeboat?
walkingplank_ancient.trans: 我们就不能造一艘救生船吗？

moonrockcrater.en: I should stick something shiny in it. For research.
moonrockcrater.trans: 我应该把闪亮的东西粘在它里面。用来研究。

book_gardening.en: I see no farm in reading that.
book_gardening.trans: 读了半天没看到一个农场。

gingerbreadhouse.en: Room and board all rolled into one.

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: I'm just hungry enough to consider it...
barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 我真是饿得够呛，居然连它都会考虑……

turf_beard_rug.en: I made it from my beard!

merm_toolshed.en: I don't think I'll find anything scientific in there.
merm_toolshed.trans: 这里头估计找不出什么科学的东西。

shadow_forge_kit.en: It would be unscientific of me not to at least do some experiments.
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 如果连实验都不做就有悖我科学家的素养了。

veryhappy.en: I think we're on good terms.

generic.trans: 我身上有它想要的东西。

monkeypillar.en: A real pillar of the community.

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: If I put some of these together, I bet I could make a beefalo costume.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 我打赌把这些拼在一起之后，一定能做出一件皮弗娄牛礼服。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: If I put some of these together, I bet I could make a beefalo costume.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 我打赌把这些拼在一起之后，一定能做出一件皮弗娄牛礼服。

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: If I put some of these together, I bet I could make a beefalo costume.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 我打赌把这些拼在一起之后，一定能做出一件皮弗娄牛礼服。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: It looks like it packs a wallop.

wx78_moduleremover.en: Obviously a very delicate and complicated scientific instrument.
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 这显然是一个非常精细和复杂的科学仪器。

inactive.en: It's more of a pyramid than an obelisk.
inactive.trans: 它更像一座金字塔，而不是方尖碑。

active.trans: 神志正常的我还是认了吧！

handpillow_kelp.en: It's soggier than I would like.

mosquitobomb.en: I'm just itching to throw it.

bloom.en: You can't tell from far away, but it's quite smelly.
bloom.trans: 从远处看不出来，但它相当臭。

generic.en: That mushroom got too big for its own good.

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: This should help improve my carrat's stamina
yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.trans: 这个会改善胡萝卜鼠的耐力

nightlight.en: It gives off a spooky light.

twigs.en: It's a bunch of small twigs.

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

cactus_meat.en: There are still some spines between me and a tasty meal.
cactus_meat.trans: 要想把它变成一顿美味，还需要把上面的刺弄掉。

deck_of_cards.en: Are we playing with a full deck?

atrium_key.en: There is power emanating from it.

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: I wonder if she got them second hand.
pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 可能买的时候就是二手的。

balloonvest.en: If the bright colors don't attract some horrible creature, the squeaking will.
balloonvest.trans: 即使鲜艳的颜色不会引来可怕的生物，它吱吱的声音也会。

line_1.en: It depicts an old civilization. The people look hungry and scared.
line_1.trans: 它描绘了一个古老的文明。人们看起来又饿又怕。

line_2.en: This tablet is too worn to make out.
line_2.trans: 这块石板已经无法识别了。

line_5.en: It shows a massive, technologically advanced city.
line_5.trans: 这里描绘了一座科技发达的宏伟城市。

line_3.en: Something dark creeps over the city and its people.
line_3.trans: 有黑暗的东西悄悄逼近这座城市和城里的人。

line_4.en: The people are shedding their skins. They look different underneath.
line_4.trans: 人们的皮肤在脱落。他们的表里截然不同。

cooldown.en: It needs time to recover. Me too.
cooldown.trans: 它需要时间恢复。我也是。

off.en: The essential components are still intact.
off.trans: 主要部分依然完好无损。

asparagus_cooked.en: Science says it's good for me.

abandoned.en: It's so sad, I can't stand it.

generic.en: It's big, it's heavy, and it's wood.

spider_repellent.en: If only science could make it work for me.
spider_repellent.trans: 如果科学能让它为我所用就好了。

trails.en: He's got a strong arm on him.

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: Somehow it seems crankier than the real one.
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 不知为什么，它看起来比正版的更暴躁。

carnival_vest_c.en: I hope there's no bugs in it...

carnival_vest_b.en: It's like wearing my own shade tree.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 就像穿上了自己专属的树荫。

merm_lunar.en: The next phase of merm evolution.
merm_lunar.trans: 这是鱼人进化的下一个相位。

emberlight.en: A fire without fuel? No matter.
emberlight.trans: 不用燃料的火焰？不要紧。

growing.en: I guess it just grows like that.
growing.trans: 我猜它自己就是会长成这样。

book_bees.en: I don't get all the buzz around this one.
book_bees.trans: 我不理解这本书为什么会嗡嗡响。

generic.en: This sad tree has no cones.
generic.trans: 这棵悲催的树没有球果。

burnt.en: I feel like I could have prevented that.
burnt.trans: 我觉得我本可以阻止这种事情发生的。

revealed.en: If we trade, will we beef friends?
revealed.trans: 交易以后，我们就牛转成朋友吗？

generic.trans: 这皮弗娄牛长得可真奇怪。

gazpacho.en: How in science does it taste so good?
gazpacho.trans: 不科学啊，怎么这么好吃？

archive_lockbox.en: Now how do I get the knowledge out?
archive_lockbox.trans: 我怎么把知识取出来呢？

carnival_vest_a.en: I think it makes me look adventurous.
carnival_vest_a.trans: 这让我看起来很有冒险精神。

hound.trans: 你啥都不是，你只是条狗！

firestarter.en: I wonder if this is how the dinosaurs felt.
firestarter.trans: 恐龙当时是不是就是这种感觉？

ghost.en: That's one spooky monkey.
ghost.trans: 那只猴子真吓人。

attacker.en: Hey, stop monkeying around!
attacker.trans: 嘿，别像猴子一样胡闹了！

reviver.en: My life has been saved... by a monkey?
reviver.trans: 我的命居然是……猴子救的？

wx78module_maxhealth.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

generic.en: I guess you're in charge around here?

wagstaff_mutations_note.trans: 引人入胜！引人深思！引人大脑变大！

quagmire_rubble_chimney.en: Something put a damper on that chimney.

yotb_post_item.en: I'd better get that set up.

inspectself.en: Am I still in one piece?

book_brimstone.en: The beginning was dull, but got better near the end.
book_brimstone.trans: 开头很无聊，但将近结尾就变好了。

klaus.en: What on earth is that thing!

fused_shadeling.en: I liked you better when you were smaller, and bothering someone else.
fused_shadeling.trans: 我还是更喜欢你小的时候，那时候你烦的是别人。

glassed.en: I have the strangest feeling I'm being watched.
glassed.trans: 我有种奇怪的感觉，好像有人在盯着我。

cave.en: There's no moon down here to measure.
cave.trans: 这下面没有月亮来测量。

generic.en: Water amplifies the science, allowing us to measure the moon.
generic.trans: 水放大了科学，让我们能够测量月亮。

archive_security_pulse.en: Where are you going? Someplace interesting?
archive_security_pulse.trans: 你这是要上哪去？是个有意思的地方吗？

done.en: Should make things a little tastier.

generic.trans: 它可以给食物增添辛香风味。

tomato_oversized.trans: 一颗比例惊人的西红柿。

thulecite.en: I wonder where this is from?

burnt.en: One less thorn patch to worry about.
burnt.trans: 少了一片需要担心的荆棘。
不剩什么睡觉的东西了。

generic.en: I get sort of crazy when I don't sleep.

boat_grass_item.trans: 从技术上讲，这是一条船。

bodypillow_petals.en: At least it smells nicer than the beefalo pillow.
bodypillow_petals.trans: 起码比皮弗娄牛枕头好闻。

moon_cap_cooked.en: The things I do in the name of science...
moon_cap_cooked.trans: 我为了科学也是豁出去了……

mermarmorupgradedhat.en: It won't fit me. It's a merm helmet.
mermarmorupgradedhat.trans: 这个不适合我，这是一个鱼人头盔。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

barnacle_cooked.en: I'm told it's quite a delicacy.
barnacle_cooked.trans: 我听说这是一道珍馐美味。

dreadstone_stack.en: It's coming from deep down in those chasms...
dreadstone_stack.trans: 它来自于那些裂隙深处...

quagmire_sapling.en: I can't get anything else out of that.
quagmire_sapling.trans: 我从中弄不到其他东西。

klaus_sack.trans: 我们绝对应该打开那东西。

eyemaskhat.en: You could say I have an eye for style.

wx78module_bee.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_bee.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

meat.en: It's a bit gamey, but it'll do.
meat.trans: 虽然有点腥味，但还凑合。

locked.en: It won't open without the key.

generic.en: It's a safe. For keeping things safe.
generic.trans: 这是保险箱，用来保护物品安全的。

chopped.en: There might still be something worth digging up.
chopped.trans: 可能还有东西值得挖一挖。

generic.en: A dead tree that washed up on shore.
generic.trans: 被冲到岸上的一颗枯树。

mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 这是一张开裂的玩偶面具。

honeynuggets.en: Tastes like chicken, but I don't think it is.
honeynuggets.trans: 味道像鸡肉，但我觉得不是鸡肉。

desiccantboosted.en: It leaves me high and dry!

messagebottle.en: I wonder if it's for me!
messagebottle.trans: 不知道是不是送给我的！

ghost.en: Looks like someone threw a wrench into your plans.
ghost.trans: 好像有人在给你的计划泼冷水呢。

firestarter.en: Things are burning up at the factory.

attacker.en: %s is a safety hazard.

reviver.en: You're pretty handy to have around, %s.

record.en: Drat, I just got that song out of my head!
record.trans: 该死，我刚把那首歌从脑袋里赶走！

pomegranate.en: It looks like the inside of an alien's brain.
pomegranate.trans: 它看起来就像外星人的大脑。

fossil_piece.en: Science bones! We should put them back together.
fossil_piece.trans: 科学的骨头！我们应该把它们一起放回去。

dead.trans: 应该找人通知它的家人。

generic.en: They kind of creep me out.

burnt.en: I didn't mildew it, I swear.
burnt.trans: 我没有让它发霉，我发誓。

off.en: We could make a prime light source with some primary colors.
off.trans: 我们可以用一些主要颜色来生成一个主要光源。

on.en: Blue is obviously the most scientific color.
on.trans: 蓝色明显是最科学的颜色。

ready.en: It looks like it needs a large key.
ready.trans: 看起来它需要一把大钥匙。

firenettles.en: If you can't stand the heat, stay out of the garden.
firenettles.trans: 如果你受不了热，就不要在花园里呆着。

scrap_monoclehat.en: Does it make me look more distinguished?
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 有没有让我看起来更尊贵一点？

freshlight.en: It's nice to have a little light.

oldlight.en: Did we remember to pick up new bulbs?
oldlight.trans: 我们没忘记拿新灯泡吧？

burnt.en: A burnt vase on a burnt table.
burnt.trans: 一个放在烧焦的桌子上的烧焦的花瓶。

generic.en: A flower in a vase on a table.

empty.en: I should put something in there.
empty.trans: 我应该把一些东西放进那里。

supertacklecontainer.en: I had to shell out quite a bit to get this.
supertacklecontainer.trans: 我费了九牛二虎之力才弄到手的。

beequeenhivegrown.en: How in science did it get so big?!
beequeenhivegrown.trans: 不科学啊，它是怎么长到这么大的？！

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 一个即将到来的船用保险杠。

beargerfur_sack.en: There's still fur on it. Chilling.
beargerfur_sack.trans: 上面还有它的毛。寒毛直竖啊。

chesspiece_dragonfly.en: Ah, that brings back memories. Bad ones.
chesspiece_dragonfly.trans: 啊，这让我想起一些事情。不好的记忆。

moon_altar_idol.en: I feel compelled to carry it somewhere.
moon_altar_idol.trans: 我有种强烈的感觉想把它搬走。

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: These ones have an explosive personality.

comfy.en: I never thought I would see a happy egg.
comfy.trans: 我从未想过我会见到一只高兴的蛋。

cold.en: I don't think that egg is warm enough.

quagmire_tomato_cooked.en: Cooking's easy if you understand chemistry.
quagmire_tomato_cooked.trans: 懂化学的话做饭就非常简单了。

batwing_cooked.en: At least it's not coming back.
batwing_cooked.trans: 至少它不会再活过来了。

crabking_mob_knight.en: This shell be quite the challenge.

generic.en: The hole in the center makes it more aerodynamic, that's just physics!
generic.trans: 中间的孔让它更符合空气动力学，经典的物理学原理！

some_kelp.en: I think I could fit some more kelp in there.
some_kelp.trans: 我觉得里面应该还能放一些海带进去。

generic.trans: 看起来好悲伤，一条海带都没……

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: This could be replanted closer to home.

picked.en: It was cut down in the prime of its life.
picked.trans: 它在长得最好的时候被采走了。

withered.en: It's not going to grow back while it's so hot.
withered.trans: 天气这么热，它不会长回来。

carnival_plaza_kit.en: It's a scientifically proven fact that birds love trees.
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 科学已经证明了鸟儿喜欢树。

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: Looking at it makes my head feel funny.
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 看着它让我的头感觉怪怪的。

generic.en: I can water the plants with this.
generic.trans: 我可以用这个给植物浇水。

empty.en: Maybe there's a pond around here somewhere...

monkey_smallhat.en: At least it will keep my hair dry.
monkey_smallhat.trans: 起码能让我的头发不被水打湿。

boat_leak.en: I should patch that up before we sink.

mutator_dropper.en: Ah, I... just ate! Why don't you give it to one of your spider friends?
mutator_dropper.trans: 呃，我……刚吃过饭！你拿去给你的蜘蛛朋友好吗？

wormhole_limited.en: Guh, that thing looks worse off than usual.
wormhole_limited.trans: 啊，那玩意看着不太对啊。

dustmothden.en: They're snug as bugs in there.
dustmothden.trans: 它们在里面过得很舒服。

winterhat.en: It'll be good for when winter comes.
winterhat.trans: 冬天来的时候，它能派上大用场。

security_pulse_cage_full.en: Aren't you the cutest little ball of pure energy?
security_pulse_cage_full.trans: 你是最可爱的纯能量小球吗？

vegstinger.en: Can you use the celery as a straw?
vegstinger.trans: 你能把芹菜当吸管用吗？

rainhat.en: Messy hair... the terrible price of dryness.
rainhat.trans: 头发乱了...干燥带来的可怕后果。

reviving.en: What in the name of science?!
reviving.trans: 以科学的名义，这是什么玩意？！

generic.en: Why do I still feel uneasy?
generic.trans: 为什么我仍然感到不安？

lichen.en: Only a cyanobacteria could grow in this light.
lichen.trans: 只有蓝藻能在这种光线条件下生长。

kitcoon_forest.en: Aren't you the cutest little cat thing!
kitcoon_forest.trans: 你就是最可爱的小猫咪！

book_tentacles.en: Someone'll get suckered into reading this.
book_tentacles.trans: 有人会被拖着去读这本书。

boatpatch_kelp.en: It'll have to do for now.

flower_withered.en: I don't think it got enough sun.
flower_withered.trans: 我觉得它还没晒够太阳呢。

generic.en: All dressed up and nowhere to go.
generic.trans: 即使打扮得漂漂亮亮，还是哪也去不了。

burnt.en: All burnt up and nowhere to go.
burnt.trans: 即使烧光了，还是哪也去不了。

generic.en: Looks science-y. How does it work?
generic.trans: 看起来很科学。工作原理是什么？

off.en: I could get it working, if Winona's busy.
off.trans: 要是薇诺娜忙，我也能让它运作起来。

diseased.trans: 它看上去真的很不舒服。

dead.trans: 现在我可以轻松的呼吸了。

sleeping.en: I have a very strong desire to run.
sleeping.trans: 有股强烈的欲望让我赶快跑。

shieldofterror.en: The best defense is a good mawfence.
shieldofterror.trans: 最好的防御就是下巴做成的盾牌。

beefalowool.trans: 闻起来像皮弗娄牛的眼泪。

wx78module_cold.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_cold.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

yellowstaff.en: A genius invention... a gem on a stick.
yellowstaff.trans: 天才发明...棍子上有宝石。

stash_map.en: It's nice to have some direction in life.
stash_map.trans: 在生活中有一些方向是极好的。

line_1.en: So much knowledge, if only I could read it!
line_1.trans: 如此多的知识，我要是能看懂就好了！

line_2.en: These markings look different from the ones in the rest of the ruins.
line_2.trans: 这些标记看起来与其他废墟中的标记不同。

line_5.en: So much knowledge, if only I could read it!
line_5.trans: 如此多的知识，我要是能看懂就好了！

line_3.en: So much knowledge, if only I could read it!
line_3.trans: 如此多的知识，我要是能看懂就好了！

line_4.en: These markings look different from the ones in the rest of the ruins.
line_4.trans: 这些标记看起来与其他废墟中的标记不同。

pig_coin.en: This'll pay off in a fight.
pig_coin.trans: 在战斗中花掉它会有好的回报。

empty.en: Hm... what does a carrat like to eat?
empty.trans: 嗯……胡萝卜鼠喜欢吃什么呢？

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: Not much time left! Where are they?!
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 剩下的时间不多了！它们在哪？！

generic.en: You'd have to be pretty small to fit in there.
generic.trans: 个头够小才能藏在里面。

bunnystew.en: This one's luck has run out.

carnival_crowkid.en: Good day to you, small bird person.

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: It doesn't look too hard to build.

petals.en: Sure showed those flowers who's boss!
petals.trans: 这下花儿们知道谁才是老大了！

blowdart_fire.trans: 这东西似乎根本不安全。

gelblob_bottle.en: I tend to keep things bottled up.
gelblob_bottle.trans: 我喜欢把东西装瓶放好。

generic.en: I'm burning with curiosity to see what's on offer.
generic.trans: 供品会是什么？我的好奇心在燃烧。

empty.en: It might like a piece of charcoal.

quagmire_key.en: Safe bet this'll come in handy.
quagmire_key.trans: 我敢肯定，它会派上用场的。

generic.en: You'll pay for breaking all that science!
generic.trans: 你会为破坏科学付出代价！

dead.en: This time I'm sure I got it.
dead.trans: 这回我很确定我收拾了它。

generic.en: I think I just made it angry...

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: It's giving me a stony stare.

lightsout.en: Come ON! I know you're home!

burnt.trans: 现在没那么舒适了吧，猪！

generic.en: These pigs have pretty fancy houses.

full.en: I can see a snout pressed up against the window.
full.trans: 我可以看见有个鼻子贴着窗户。

drying_notmeat.en: Drying things is not an exact science.

drying.en: Meat takes a while to dry.

dryinginrain.en: Meat takes even longer to dry in rain.
dryinginrain.trans: 雨天晾干肉需要更长时间。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: Rain, rain, go away. Be wet again another day.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 雨啊，快走开。想下，改天来。

done_notmeat.en: In laboratory terms, we would call that "dry".
done_notmeat.trans: 实验术语里，我们管它叫“干燥”。

wx78_scanner_item.en: I wonder if it dreams about scanning sheep.
wx78_scanner_item.trans: 我想知道它是否会梦到扫描羊。

kitcoon_grass.en: Aren't you the cutest little cat thing!
kitcoon_grass.trans: 你就是最可爱的小猫咪！

moon_altar_link.en: It must be building up to something.

yellowmooneye.en: That ought to show everyone the way.

held.en: The trick is to let it go.

statuemaxwell.en: He's a lot shorter in person.

rope_bridge_kit.en: This will keep us in suspense!

lavaarena_boarlord.en: That's the guy in charge here.

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: Our friend seems to be getting more in touch with his lunar roots.
bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 我们的朋友似乎对他的月亮根源有了更多的接触。

polly_rogershat.en: A little bird told me it will come in handy.
polly_rogershat.trans: 一只小鸟告诉我它会派上用场。

wagpunkhat.en: It really gets my gears turning.
wagpunkhat.trans: 它让我身上的齿轮也动起来了。

hermithouse_laundry.en: Should I say something, or is it unmentionable?
hermithouse_laundry.trans: 我要不要提醒她，还是装作没看见？

poweroff.en: If only there was a way to get it working again...
poweroff.trans: 要是有办法让它重新运作就好了……

generic.en: I have the strongest urge to stand around it and talk about nothing in particular.
generic.trans: 我有一种强烈的冲动，想站在它的周围侃侃而谈。

generic.en: Winona always struck me as someone with a vision for the future.
generic.trans: 薇诺娜在我眼里一直是一个对未来有远见的人。

waiting.trans: 或许他需要点科学的力量？

generic.en: I always wanted one of these.
generic.trans: 我一直想要拥有一件这样的装备。

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: The snowbird quill helps me stay frosty.

ancienttree_seed.en: There are no surprises, only incomplete data.
ancienttree_seed.trans: 世上没有惊喜，只有不全面的统计。

mutator_warrior.en: Oh wow, that looks um... delicious, Webber!
mutator_warrior.trans: 哦，哇，这看起来嗯……很好吃，韦伯!

maxwellhead.en: I can see into his pores.
maxwellhead.trans: 我可以看到他毛孔里面的东西。

dreadstonehat.en: To keep my brilliant brain safe and sound.
dreadstonehat.trans: 它能保护我无以伦比的大脑安然无恙。

accomplishment_shrine.en: I want to use it, and I want the world to know that I did.
accomplishment_shrine.trans: 我想用一下它，我想让全世界都知道我的所作所为。

houndmound.en: I've got no bones to pick with the owner. Really.
houndmound.trans: 我不想找主人的茬。真的。

armorslurper.trans: 一根湿漉漉的、帮助你抵抗饥饿的腰带。

quagmire_rotten_crop.en: I don't think the altar will want that.
quagmire_rotten_crop.trans: 我认为这个不适合出现在祭坛上。

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

seeds_cooked.en: That cooked the life right out of 'em!
seeds_cooked.trans: 生命精华都被烤出来了！

candybag.en: It's some sort of delicious pocket dimension for sugary treats.
candybag.trans: 它是某种美味的小小的甜点。

mutatedbearger.en: Things are about to get hairy...
mutatedbearger.trans: 事情要变得毛骨悚然了……

hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.en: I should save it for desert.

dragonchilisalad.en: I hope I can handle the spice level.
dragonchilisalad.trans: 希望能承受住辛辣的程度。

monstermeat.en: Ugh. I don't think I should eat that.

sewing_kit.en: Darn it! Darn it all to heck!

low.trans: 那块熔岩正在裹上石皮。

wagstaff_tool_1.en: That has to be the tool I'm looking for!
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 那正是我苦苦寻找的工具！

batnose.en: Who knows whose nose this is?
batnose.trans: 有人知道这是谁的鼻子吗？

wagstaff_tool_2.en: Of course I know what it is! It's just, er... too complicated to explain.
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 我当然知道是怎么回事！只是，诶……解释起来太复杂。

butterflywings.en: Without these, it's just a butter.
butterflywings.trans: 没了这些，它只是条毛虫。

armor_sanity.en: Wearing that makes me feel safe and insecure.
armor_sanity.trans: 穿着我虽然安全了，心里确不踏实。

wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 这明显是一个十分科学的工具！

wagstaff_tool_4.en: My scientific instincts tell me that this is the tool I'm looking for!
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 我的科学本能告诉我，这就是我一直在寻找的工具！

wagstaff_tool_5.en: I know exactly what it does! Science!
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 我知道它能做什么！科学！

panettone.en: This Yuletide bread really rose to the occasion.
panettone.trans: 这个仲冬节的面包真是应景。

dead.en: The petals droop and shimmer in the light.

generic.en: The petals shimmer in the light.

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

steeringwheel_item.en: That's going to be the steering wheel.

book_fire.en: I don't feel a burning need to read it.
book_fire.trans: 并没有心急火燎的阅读冲动。

cactus_flower.en: A pretty flower from a prickly plant.
cactus_flower.trans: 多刺植物开出的美丽花朵。

fishmeat_small_cooked.en: A small bit of cooked fish.

torch.en: Something to hold back the night.

generic.en: I'd like to sit on that... rockin' chair!

occupied.en: Somebody else is sitting on that.

chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 怎么看它都觉得有些鳍跷。

armor_lunarplant_husk.en: That'll put a thorn in your side.

cutlichen.en: Nutritious, but it won't last long.
cutlichen.trans: 有营养，但保存不了多久。

bunnyman.en: I am filled with an irresistible urge to do science.
bunnyman.trans: 我要马上搞科研，饥渴难耐。

burnt.en: The measuring parts went up in a cloud of smoke.
burnt.trans: 测量部分化成一缕青烟了。

lavaarena_armormedium.en: It offers a decent amount of protection.

spiderhat.en: I hope I got all of the spider goo out of it.
spiderhat.trans: 我希望把蜘蛛的黏性物质都弄掉了。

nightcaphat.en: No more bedhead for this scientist!
nightcaphat.trans: 本科学家再也不怕睡觉压坏发型了！

withered.en: It might be okay if it cooled down.
withered.trans: 如果能给它降降温，也许它能好起来。

punchingbag.en: It comes with a finely calibrated ouch-o-meter.
punchingbag.trans: 它配备了一个精心校准的“哎哟”仪表。

hermitcrabtea_firenettles.en: It should come with a warming label.

lavaarena_eyecirclethat.en: It has a gaze full of science.

voidcloth_umbrella.en: I always hate when my hair gets melted by acid.
voidcloth_umbrella.trans: 我最烦头发被强酸溶解了。

sweatervest.en: This vest is dapper as all get-out.

generic.en: A festive furnace for flame-grilled foodstuffs!
generic.trans: 喜庆的炉子，用来做火烤的食物！

generic.en: Looks like an offering to the beast.
generic.trans: 看起来像是给野兽的供品。

empty.en: That rabbit looks hungry.

moonstorm_static_roamer.trans: 它好像在传输过程中迷路了。

horn.en: It sounds like a beefalo field in there.
horn.trans: 听起来好像那里面有一个皮弗娄牛牧场。

purplegem.en: It contains the mysteries of the universe.

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: A bobber might improve its accuracy.

lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.en: I'd have energy for a few more stunts wearing that.
lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.trans: 穿上它，我就有能量多耍几招。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: Some fish might find this a-luring!

farm_plow_item.en: I'd better find a good spot for my garden before I use it.
farm_plow_item.trans: 我得先找个好的种地的园子才能使用它。

livingtree_sapling.en: It'll grow up big and horrifying.

corn_oversized.en: What a big ear you have!

charging.en: I think she forgot to attach these buttons to her machine.
charging.trans: 她大概忘了把按钮装到她的机器上了。

charged.en: I think she forgot to attach these buttons to her machine.
charged.trans: 她大概忘了把按钮装到她的机器上了。

generic.en: I think she forgot to attach these buttons to her machine.
generic.trans: 她大概忘了把按钮装到她的机器上了。

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: It really melts away my madness.
hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.trans: 它还真融化了我的疯狂。

oceanvine.trans: 它的科学术语是“树面条”。

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: The blossom interacts well with healing magic.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 这花朵和治愈魔法很合拍。

dumbbell_golden.en: It's worth its weight in gold.

inactive.en: Where did the rest of it go?
inactive.trans: 它的其余部分去哪儿了？

shellweaver.en: I salt to make something useful.
shellweaver.trans: 我盐究制作点有用的东西。

batwing.en: I hate those things, even when they're dead.
batwing.trans: 那些东西即使死了都很讨厌。

oceanfishingrod.en: Now this is the reel deal!
oceanfishingrod.trans: 这才是货真价实的海钓竿！

balloonhat.en: The static does terrible things to my hair.
balloonhat.trans: 静电把我的头发弄得很可怕。

generic.en: I'm glad it's just a statue.

portablefirepit_item.en: Finally, fire on the go! Patent pending.
portablefirepit_item.trans: 终于可以随身带火了！专利待批。

carnivaldecor_banner.en: I think all these shiny decorations reflect well on me.
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 这些闪亮的装饰品已经说明了一切。

wagpunk_lever.en: It's a good time to switch things up.

backpack.en: You could fit a whole lot of science in there.
backpack.trans: 你可以在那里面装进许多科学。

pumpkin.en: It's as big as my head!

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

chesspiece_formal.trans: 对我来说，看起来没有非常“高贵”。

slingshot_band_mimic.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

festive_blueprint.en: This is just the occasion for some festivity!
festive_blueprint.trans: 是时候来点节庆活动了！

reskin_tool.en: I like the dust! It feels scholarly!
reskin_tool.trans: 我喜欢这些粉尘！感觉十分学术！

diseased.en: It looks sick. More so than usual.
diseased.trans: 它看起来很糟糕。比平常还严重。

burnt.en: I feel like I could have prevented that.
burnt.trans: 我觉得我本可以阻止这种事情发生的。

book_silviculture.en: I'll stick to my own experiments.
book_silviculture.trans: 我还是坚持自己的实验吧。

mashedpotatoes.en: I've heard cooking is basically chemistry. I should try it.
mashedpotatoes.trans: 我听说做饭基本上就是化学。我应该试试。

berries_juicy_cooked.en: Better eat them before they spoil!

cool.trans: 我喜欢把它叫作“干唾液”。

webberskull.en: Poor little guy. He deserves a proper funeral.
webberskull.trans: 可怜的小家伙。应该为他举办一个体面的葬礼。

lavaarena_feathercrownhat.en: Those fluffy feathers make me want to run!
lavaarena_feathercrownhat.trans: 我一看见那些蓬松的羽毛就想跑！

exposed.en: A pillar of impossibly hard stone.

generic.en: There's something glinting inside the marble.
generic.trans: 大理石里有东西在闪烁。

hareball.en: At this point... I've eaten worse things.
hareball.trans: 到如今……比这更糟的东西我都吃过。

nature_blueprint.en: You really can't go wrong with flowers.

wagboss_robot_constructionsite.en: Keeping it under wraps for now.

lunar_seed.en: This formed part of its crown.
lunar_seed.trans: 这曾是它王冠的一部分。

shadowdancer.en: Some things you can never unsee...
shadowdancer.trans: 有些东西你看到后就想赶紧忘掉……

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: How strange, carrying one makes my pocket feel lighter!
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 真是奇怪，装在我的口袋里居然还能发光！

blowdart_lava2.en: It uses a strong blast of air to propel a projectile.
blowdart_lava2.trans: 它利用一股强气流来推动抛射物。

plantregistryhat.en: To understand the plant, you must wear the plant.
plantregistryhat.trans: 要了解植物，就必须戴上植物。

generic.en: My vast scientific knowledge tells me it's... a moon butterfly.
generic.trans: 我渊博的科学知识告诉我，这是一只月光蝴蝶。

spore_moon.en: I'll keep as mushroom between me and those spores as I can.
spore_moon.trans: 我要尽量离这些孢子远一点。

uncovered.en: It's not in the best shape.

covered.en: It's some sort of marble statue.

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: The fish won't snow what hit them!
oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.trans: 鱼儿都不会知道是谁下的手！

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: Its support is getting me all fired up!
boatrace_spectator_dragonling.trans: 它的支持让我燃了起来！

generic.en: Science help me, I can't decipher this handwriting.
generic.trans: 科学帮帮我吧，我实在破译不了这些笔迹。

horrorfuel.en: It sends a terrible shiver down my spine.
horrorfuel.trans: 它让我脊椎发出了可怕的颤抖。

burnt.en: That puts a damper on the festivities.

generic.en: I need a pine cone for that.

quagmire_rubble_chimney2.en: Something put a damper on that chimney.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: Some smaller fish might find this a-luring!

quagmire_sap_spoiled.en: Might as well toss it on the fire.

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: This sculpture is a bit of an eyesore.
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 这座雕塑看起来有点刺眼。

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: I need to plant this in the right place.
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 我得把它种在对的地方。

moon_altar_ward.en: It wants to be with the others.
moon_altar_ward.trans: 它需要和其他的那些放在一起。

uncovered.trans: 有一个大的碎片没找到。

covered.en: It looks old, but it feels new.
covered.trans: 看起来很老，但感觉挺新。

rock_avocado_fruit.en: I'd shatter my teeth on that.

fish.en: Now I shall eat for a day.

generic.en: The real treasure is the treasure we found along the way.
generic.trans: 真正的宝物是我们在寻宝过程中的成长。

critter_lamb.en: Much less mucusy than its momma.
critter_lamb.trans: 比起它妈妈，它的粘液少多了。

snurtle.en: He's less gross, but still gross.
snurtle.trans: 他不算太恶心，但还是恶心。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: My brain is protected by a thick layer of hard science!
oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.trans: 我的大脑有一层硬科学在保护！

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Is it dead? That strange energy still seems to be lingering around it.
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 它死了吗？那股神秘的力量好像还在它附近游荡。

burning.en: It looks a little hot under the collar.
burning.trans: 它的树干好像有点过热了。

stalker_atrium.en: Why'd it have to be so big?
stalker_atrium.trans: 为什么它必须这么大呢？

freshlight.en: It's nice to have a little light.

oldlight.en: I know I told Maxwell to replace the bulb.
oldlight.trans: 我记得告诉过麦斯威尔换灯泡的。

empty.en: A nice vase without any flowers.

poweroff.en: Whatever it did, it's not doing it anymore.
poweroff.trans: 它已经失去了从前的作用。

figkabab.en: Fig with a side of stick.
figkabab.trans: 旁边有根棍子的无花果。

shadow_battleaxe.en: Yikes! I'd rather bury this hatchet.

generic.en: It's a bit more toned down.
Is that what the ocean sounds like?
It's ready for the high C's.

yotd_steeringwheel.en: That'll steer me in the right direction. And the left direction.
yotd_steeringwheel.trans: 它会让我驶向正确的航向，左右都逢源。

chopped.en: That was a pretty thick tree.

generic.en: I didn't know trees grew on the moon.

slurtlehat.en: That would mess up my hair.

seeds.en: Each one is a tiny mystery.
seeds.trans: 每一颗都是一个小小的谜。

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: I have to build it myself? I should have known there'd be a catch.
carnivaldecor_banner_kit.trans: 我必须自己建造它？我早该料到的。

picked.en: I don't think it's growing back.

generic.trans: 那些是蘑菇吗？这真是一桩难题。

imprisoned.en: I feel almost sorry for him.

generic.en: Freeing him might not have been my best idea.
generic.trans: 释放他可能有些草率了。

generic.en: I'm not sure what that's supposed to be.
generic.trans: 我不确定那是什么东西。

empty.en: I broke it. For science.

valid.en: Those gems seem to power it... through entirely scientific means, I'm sure.
valid.trans: 它看起来是由这些宝石供能……十分科学，我敢肯定。

mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 我有的都是闪闪发光的好主意。

armorgrass.en: Hopefully there aren't any bugs in it.

gestalt_guard.en: They're promising me... a good smack if I get too close.
gestalt_guard.trans: 它跟我保证……靠得太近就扇我一巴掌。

dragonboat_kit.en: I'd better stop dragon my feet and build it.
dragonboat_kit.trans: 别拖泥带水了，麻利点做好吧。

ghost.en: Nice try. You're not escaping to Valhalla yet, %s.
ghost.trans: 做的不错。你还没逃离英灵殿呢，%s。

firestarter.en: %s is really heating things up today.

attacker.en: I'd like to avoid a punch from %s, if possible.
attacker.trans: 有可能的话，我会躲开%s的拳头。

reviver.en: %s has full command of spirits.

antliontrinket.en: Someone might be interested in this.

match_but_snack.en: It's more of a light snack, really.

match.en: Science says this will appease the sky God.
match.trans: 科学说这样会安抚天空之神。

generic.en: I should offer it on the Altar of Gnaw.
generic.trans: 我应该把它献祭在饕餮祭坛上。

flower_cave.trans: 是科学的力量让它发光。

burnt.en: There was something fishy about that throne anyway.
burnt.trans: 本来那王座就一股鱼腥味。

generic.en: Looks fit for a swamp king!
generic.trans: 配得上沼泽之王的地位！

cooking_long.en: This is going to take a while.

empty.en: It makes me hungry just to look at it.

mermguard_lunar.en: The next phase of merm evolution.
mermguard_lunar.trans: 这是鱼人进化的下一个相位。

chesspiece_malbatross.en: It's not so bad when it isn't trying to kill you.
chesspiece_malbatross.trans: 它不追着杀你的时候还是挺可爱的。

yotb_sewingmachine_item.en: There looks to be a bit of assembly required.

burning.en: That can't be good for the plants...
burning.trans: 这对植物来说不是好事……

full_weed.en: I knew I'd weed out the imposter eventually!
full_weed.trans: 我早就想到了有天我会把这个冒牌货斩草除根！

growing.trans: 生长吧，我美丽的造物，生长吧！

full_oversized.en: With the power of science, I've produced monstrous produce!
full_oversized.trans: 我用科学的力量生产出了巨型农作物!

rotten.en: Drat! If only I'd picked it while I had the chance!
rotten.trans: 可惜啊！要是在成熟的时候收割就好了!

full.trans: 是时候收获科学的成果了。

ancientfruit_gem.en: Hot and fresh off the tree.
ancientfruit_gem.trans: 树上新鲜掉下来的，还热着呢。

berries_juicy.en: Extra tasty, though they won't last long.
berries_juicy.trans: 非常美味，虽然美味稍纵即逝。

held.en: I'm not squishing you, am I?
held.trans: 我并没有在压扁你，不是吗？

generic.en: Some sort of yellow creature made of science.
generic.trans: 某种科学制成的黄色生物。

spiderden_bedazzler.en: It looks like someone's been getting crafty.
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 看起来某人的手艺提高了不少啊。

wall_scrap_item.en: It's like a bundle wrap, of scrap.

wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.en: Big automatons really do come in small packages.
wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.trans: 大机器人真的分装成了小包。

oceanfish_medium_9.en: That's the sweet smell of a successful fishing trip.
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 成功钓鱼之旅的甜蜜味道。

glassspike.en: Memories of the time I wasn't skewered.
glassspike.trans: 我还没有被刺穿时的记忆。

oceanfish_medium_5.en: This one seems kind of corny.

oceanfish_medium_4.en: I'm sure this won't bring me any bad luck.
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 不知道这个会不会带来厄运。

oceanfish_medium_3.en: I wasn't lion about my aptitude for fishing!
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 我钓鱼的技术可不是盖的！

oceanfish_medium_2.en: I went to a lot of treble to catch it.

oceanfish_medium_1.en: I certainly hope it tastes better than it looks.
oceanfish_medium_1.trans: 看着丑，希望味道好吃点吧。

seedpouch.en: I was getting tired of carrying loose seeds in my pockets.
seedpouch.trans: 我早就不想把种子装在口袋里了。

lightflier.en: How strange, carrying one makes my pocket feel lighter!
lightflier.trans: 真是奇怪，装在我的口袋里居然还能发光！

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: This garland will restore a bit of my vitality.

generic.en: That looks like a bad time just waiting to happen.
generic.trans: 坏事发生只是时间问题。

moonstaff.en: The stone lit it up somehow.

wrongstaff.en: I have a distinct feeling this isn't right.
wrongstaff.trans: 我有一种明显的感觉，这不对。

generic.en: There's a hole in the middle for something to go in.
generic.trans: 中间有个洞，好像可以扔东西进去。

yotr_decor_1_item.en: I know just the place for it.

rhinodrill.en: He's got a nose for this kind of work.
rhinodrill.trans: 他的鼻子很适合干这个活。

generic.en: I'm always drawn to physics, like a... ah, can't think of the word.
generic.trans: 一直以来我都被物理学所吸引，就像……一样，怎么想不起那个词了。

activated.en: It's working!! Er, I knew it would work, of course.
activated.trans: 奏效了！！呃，我当然一早就知道它能行。

dragonheadhat.en: So who gets to be the head?

farm_hoe.en: I have to make the ground more comfortable for the seeds.
farm_hoe.trans: 我得把地弄的让种子更舒服一些。

phlegm.en: It's thick and pliable. And salty.
phlegm.trans: 浓稠而软滑。味道咸咸的。

eggplant.en: It doesn't look like an egg.

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: That was a terrible night of very uncomfortable eye contact.
chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 恐怖之夜里出现了非常不舒服的眼神接触。

book_temperature.en: My thoughts on it are only lukewarm.
book_temperature.trans: 我对它的想法不温不火。

dirt.en: Just looks like a pile of dirt.

mooseegg.en: The babies are like excited electrons trying to escape.
mooseegg.trans: 婴儿们就像试图逃逸的受激电子。

batbat.en: I bet I could fly if I held two of them.
batbat.trans: 我敢打赌，如果我拿着其中俩个我就能飞起来。

carnivaldecor_plant.en: Either it's small, or I'm gigantic.

starving.en: Has no one fed you in awhile?

generic.en: Now it just needs a bird.

fish_box.en: They're stuffed in there like sardines!
fish_box.trans: 它们像沙丁鱼一样塞得满满的！

onion_oversized.en: They grow up so fast! It's... it's bringing a tear to my eye.
onion_oversized.trans: 它们这么快就长这么大了！不禁让我的眼眶都湿了。

generic.en: Oh no! It's a killer bee!
These used to grow in my bathroom.
generic.trans: 我的浴室里过去生长着这些东西。

featherpencil.en: The feather increases the scientific properties of the writing.
featherpencil.trans: 有根羽毛写出来的字都科学了。

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

beast_blueprint.en: I'm feeling lucky about this one!

generic.en: Treehouses are terribly flammable places to conduct experiments.
generic.trans: 树屋过于易燃，并非最佳实验场所。

overloaded.en: It's about to explode! ...Sorry, old habit from my lab days.
overloaded.trans: 快要爆炸了！……抱歉，让你看到我在实验室时的旧习惯了。

off.trans: 科学每次都能战胜魔法。

lavaarena_armor_hp.trans: 它应该能保护我的安全。

book_sleep.en: Strange, it's just 500 pages of telegraph codes.
book_sleep.trans: 奇怪，这只是五百页的电报码。

critter_bulbin.en: You'd never do anything rotten, would you?
critter_bulbin.trans: 你肯定不会做什么腐坏的事，对吧？

saddle_basic.en: That'll allow the mounting of some smelly animal.
saddle_basic.trans: 有了它就可以骑臭动物了。

recharging.en: I guess it needs time to... recalibrate the, uh... time whatsit.
recharging.trans: 我想它需要时间来……重新校准……时间什么的。

generic.en: I bet there's a lot of interesting science inside.
generic.trans: 我打赌里面一定有十分有趣的科学结构。

shadowrift_portal.en: That drop looks like it goes on forever.
shadowrift_portal.trans: 那东西看起来像是会一直持续下去。

generic.en: It won't let me play until I give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 它要我给它一些闪亮的东西才让我玩。

monstertartare.en: There's got to be something else to eat around here.
monstertartare.trans: 这儿一定还有别的什么能吃的。

rubble.en: Just bits and pieces of rock.

held.en: You're kind of ugly up close.

generic.en: Are carrots supposed to have legs?

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: It's about as exciting as watching grass grow.
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 书中内容大约和盯着草长高一样精彩。

malbatross_feather.en: Plucked from a fine feathered fiend.
malbatross_feather.trans: 从大鸟身上拔下的漂亮羽毛。

spat.trans: 看起来脾气暴躁的动物。

yoth_lance.trans: 可别误以为我是骑枪不离手的兰斯洛特。

kitcoon_rocky.en: I must collect more... for research!
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 我必须多收集点……做研究！

blowdart_lava.en: That's a weapon I could use from range.
blowdart_lava.trans: 我可以在范围内用这个武器。

moose_nesting_ground.trans: 它把它的婴儿放在那里。

wobster_moonglass.trans: 好一只调皮的月光龙虾。

farm_soil_debris.en: It's making a mess of my garden.
farm_soil_debris.trans: 它把我的园子弄得一团糟。

twiggy_nut_sapling.en: It doesn't need any help to grow.
twiggy_nut_sapling.trans: 它生长不需要任何助力。

bullkelp_root.en: I can plant it in deep water.

armor_yoth_knight.trans: 一堆疑问像马鞍一样重压着我。

cookiecuttershell.en: A shell of its former self.
cookiecuttershell.trans: 曾经尖牙利齿，如今只剩空壳。

earmuffshat.en: Makes you warm and fuzzy inside. Outside, too.

spider_dropper.en: Note to self: Don't look up.

moonspiderden.en: That's not a normal spider den.
moonspiderden.trans: 那可不是寻常的蜘蛛巢。

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: Maybe someone should go poke it... just to be sure.
alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 应该找个人过去戳一下……这样才能确定。

1.en: Awww, she has a cute little bow.
1.trans: 噢，她有一个可爱的小蝴蝶结。

2.en: Awww, she has a cute little bow.
2.trans: 噢，她有一个可爱的小蝴蝶结。

1.en: Awww, she has a cute little bow.
1.trans: 噢，她有一个可爱的小蝴蝶结。

2.en: Awww, she has a cute little bow.
2.trans: 噢，她有一个可爱的小蝴蝶结。

1.en: Awww, she has a cute little bow.
1.trans: 噢，她有一个可爱的小蝴蝶结。

2.en: Awww, she has a cute little bow.
2.trans: 噢，她有一个可爱的小蝴蝶结。

shadowthrall_wings.en: The wings seem to be just for show.
shadowthrall_wings.trans: 翅膀貌似仅仅是用来看的。

sleep.en: Aren't you the cutest little bucket of bolts?
sleep.trans: 你不就是最可爱的螺栓筒吗？

charging.en: Taking a break? Winona must be going easy on you.
charging.trans: 是在休息吗？薇诺娜倒是让你喘口气了。

charged.en: Taking a break? Winona must be going easy on you.
charged.trans: 是在休息吗？薇诺娜倒是让你喘口气了。

generic.en: Aren't you the cutest little bucket of bolts?
generic.trans: 你不就是最可爱的螺栓筒吗？

off.en: Taking a break? Winona must be going easy on you.
off.trans: 是在休息吗？薇诺娜倒是让你喘口气了。

fireballstaff.en: It calls a meteor from above.

generic.en: It looks warm and cozy inside.
generic.trans: 看起来里面温暖而舒适。

empty.en: Looks like somebody was camping here.
empty.trans: 看起来有人在这里扎营。

wx78module_heat.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_heat.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

grassgator.en: I don't think he likes me very much.

moqueca.en: He's as talented a chef as I am a scientist.
moqueca.trans: 他把横溢的才华用在了烹饪，我用在了科学。

cave_entrance_ruins.trans: 它有可能在隐瞒什么事情。

yotr_token.en: I should be careful who I hand this out to.
yotr_token.trans: 这个东西我可不能给错人。

molehat.en: A wretched stench, but excellent visibility.
molehat.trans: 散发着讨厌的恶臭，但视野极佳。

fence_item.en: All we need to build a nice, sturdy fence.
fence_item.trans: 有了它就能造出一个美丽牢固的栅栏。

slurperpelt.en: Doesn't look all that much different dead.
slurperpelt.trans: 死了的样子也没什么不同。

marblepillar.en: I think I could use that.

bluegem.trans: 它散发着冰冷能量的光芒。

squid.en: I have an inkling they'll come in handy.

teleportato_potato.en: This metal potato contains great and fearful power...
teleportato_potato.trans: 这个金属土豆包含强大而又可怕的力量...

saltlick.en: How many licks does it take to get to the center?

generic.en: If only I could soak my weary bones.
generic.trans: 能泡下这身疲倦的身骨该多好。

empty.en: Where's the water?

victorian_blueprint.en: I think my grandmother wore something similar.
victorian_blueprint.trans: 我奶奶好像穿过件类似的衣服。

dreadstone.en: It seems to reflect shadows instead of light.
dreadstone.trans: 它竟然反射暗影而非光线。

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: I don't think I'll find anything scientific in there.
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 这里头估计找不出什么科学的东西。

generic.en: A nice place for an afternoon rest, safely out of the heat.
generic.trans: 午后安全避暑休息的好地方。

burnt.en: It won't provide much shade now.
burnt.trans: 它现在遮不了多少阳了。

dumbbell_redgem.en: It'll really make you feel the burn.
dumbbell_redgem.trans: 我确实感受到肌肉在燃烧。

eel.en: This will make a delicious meal.

trunk_cooked.en: Somehow even more nasal than before.
trunk_cooked.trans: 不知怎么回事比以前更像鼻子了。

diviningrodstart.trans: 那根杖子看起来很有用！

pondeel.en: This will make a delicious meal.

spider_water.en: Why in the name of science do they get to float?
spider_water.trans: 科学怎么解释它们能浮起来这回事？

doll_blueprint.en: My beefalo will look as cute as a button!
doll_blueprint.trans: 我的皮弗娄牛一定会可爱动人！

boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 它在我的小船上闪耀着王冠的光芒。

spider_healer_item.en: If I see any spiders around I'll be sure to give it to them. Maybe.
spider_healer_item.trans: 要是看到蜘蛛，我一定会把它送给它们。也许吧。

ghost.en: I reject the reality of ghosts and imps.
ghost.trans: 我拒绝接受有鬼魂和恶魔的现实。

firestarter.en: %s is becoming a survival liability.

murderer.en: Time to grab the imp by the horns!
murderer.trans: 是时候正面对抗这个长角的恶魔了！

attacker.en: I knew %s couldn't be trusted!

reviver.en: Thanks for lending a helping claw, %s.

dock_woodposts_item.en: Aha! I thought the dock was missing something.
dock_woodposts_item.trans: 啊哈！我就猜到码头缺了点东西。

firestarter.en: %s's just asking to get roasted.

ghost.en: Don't look at me like that, %s! I'm working on it!
ghost.trans: 不要那样看我，%s！我在努力！

murderer.en: I'll show you Logic and Reason... those're my fists!
murderer.trans: 我要教教你逻辑和推理...这是我的强项！

attacker.en: Seems you've gone from "dapper" to "slapper".
attacker.trans: 你似乎从“说话干净利落”变成“粘舌”。

reviver.en: %s is using his powers for good.

fishmeat_small_dried.en: That fish is a real jerk.

compostwrap.en: Wormwood offered me a bite, but I respectfully declined.
compostwrap.trans: 沃姆伍德曾想让我尝一口，但我礼貌的拒绝了。

nonslipgritboosted.en: Now we're really gaining some traction!

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: Only some light work left to do.

quagmire_parkspike.en: The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing".
quagmire_parkspike.trans: 它的学名应该是“锋利、尖锐的东西”。

picked.en: I wonder if it will come back?
picked.trans: 不知道它会不会长回来？

reviving.en: I don't want to believe what my eyes are seeing!
reviving.trans: 我不愿相信双眼正在看到的这一切！

junk_pile.en: A good junk pile rummage? I'll never refuse.
junk_pile.trans: 要翻垃圾堆？我绝对不会拒绝。

maxwellphonograph.en: So that's where the music was coming from.

carrot.en: Yuck. This vegetable came out of the dirt.
carrot.trans: 真恶心，这棵蔬菜是从土里出来的。

retrieving_item.en: I'll let it do the heavy lifting.

generic.trans: 这个在必要时能派上用场。

wagdrone_parts.en: Now I can put a positive spin on things.
wagdrone_parts.trans: 这下我就可以让事情往积极的方向运转了。

upgraded_stacksize.en: The amount of storage is off the scale!
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 它提供的储存空间可谓是箱中之龙！

generic.en: Next best thing to a lockbox!

burnt.en: It's all gone up in flames!

generic.en: It's really more of a finish circle than a line.
generic.trans: 与其说是终点线，不如说是终点圈。

unwritten.trans: 这块牌子现在是空白的。

nitre_formation.en: It's definitely some kind of rock.

lightninggoathorn.en: It's like a miniature lightning rod.

wortox_souljar.en: It's rather jarring if you think about it.
wortox_souljar.trans: 如果你仔细想想，它还真不是一般的罐子。

mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.en: I've harnessed the power of electricity over land and sea!
mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.trans: 我已经驾驭了陆上和海上的电力！

yotr_decor_2_item.en: I know just the place for it.

book_fossil.en: This'll keep those monsters held for a little while.
book_fossil.trans: 这样能把那些怪物拖住一阵子。

uncovered.en: I guess he cracked under the pressure.
uncovered.trans: 我猜他在压力之下崩溃了。

covered.trans: 是一个古怪的大理石雕像。

finished.en: At least it's back in one piece now.

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: The laws of physics are surprisingly flexible.
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 物理定律竟然如此有弹性。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.en: I don't need to chew them up first, do I?
carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.trans: 我不需要先把它们嚼碎，对吧？

wall_stone_item.en: They make me feel so safe.

hawaiianshirt.trans: 穿着它做实验可不安全！

yotb_stage.en: Strange, I never see him enter or leave...
yotb_stage.trans: 奇怪啊，我没见到他登台和离开……

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: It looks heavier than the others.
mask_ancient_masonhat.trans: 这个看上去比其他的重。

complete.en: It's alive! Oh wait, no, it's not.
complete.trans: 它活着！哦等等，不，它没有。

funny.en: My scientific instincts say this isn't quite right.
funny.trans: 我科学方面的直觉告诉我这有点不对。

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: This really is a pop-up carnival.
carnivalgame_herding_kit.trans: 这还真是个快闪嘉年华。

warglet.en: It's going to be one of those days...
warglet.trans: 又要回到那些个日子了……

hermit_cracked_pearl.en: I... didn't take good care of it.

record_end.en: A whole song on one record? Technology has come so far.
record_end.trans: 一张唱片能录一整首歌？技术已经走到了这一步。

off.trans: 它是一个又大又科学的蘑菇。

goldenpitchfork.en: Why did I even make a pitchfork this fancy?
goldenpitchfork.trans: 一把叉子我都能做的这么精美？

kelp_cooked.en: It's closer to a liquid than a solid.
kelp_cooked.trans: 熟了以后有点稀，黏黏的。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: Some fish might find this a-luring!

recharging.en: It's doing "time stuff", that's the technical term.
recharging.trans: 它在做“时间之类的东西”，这就是它的术语名。

generic.en: I bet there's a lot of interesting science inside.
generic.trans: 我打赌里面一定有十分有趣的科学结构。

alterguardianhatshard.en: Even a single piece is pretty illuminating!
alterguardianhatshard.trans: 连部件都如此光彩夺目！

smallghost.en: Aww, does someone have a little boo-boo?
smallghost.trans: 嗷，你是不是个小可爱啊？

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: Soaking myself might help me think like a fish...
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 把自己弄湿能帮助我像鱼一样思考……

builtup.en: It just needed a little love.

generic.en: It's just an empty shell of a house.

battlesong_fireresistance.en: I once burned my vest before seeing a play. I call that dramatic ironing.
battlesong_fireresistance.trans: 我有一次看戏前不小心把背心烧出个洞。我称此为戏剧性熨烫。

struggle.en: The chess pieces are moving themselves!

quagmire_sapbucket.en: We can use it to gather sap from the trees.
quagmire_sapbucket.trans: 我们可以用它采集树液。

generic.en: This will attract any strong magnets nearby.
generic.trans: 附近只要有强磁铁就会受到它的吸引。

shadowheart.en: The power of science must have reanimated it...
shadowheart.trans: 科学的力量肯定使它恢复生气了...

sweettea.en: A nice cup of tea to forget all my problems.
sweettea.trans: 一杯好茶，让我忘记所有的问题。

open.en: Science compels me to jump in.

battlesong_instant_panic.en: I'm afraid I'm not a licensed poetic.
battlesong_instant_panic.trans: 恐怕我不是一个持照诗人。

quagmire_altar_queen.trans: 一座有纪念意义的纪念碑。

pondfish.en: Now I shall eat for a day.

dragonbodyhat.en: I'm middling on this middle piece.
dragonbodyhat.trans: 中间的部分让我有点犹豫。

moon_altar_icon.en: I think I know just where you belong.

stump.trans: 这棵树已经被开采过了。

generic.trans: 蔬菜与矿物质的化合物。奇特啊。

mermwatchtower_noking.en: A royal guard with no Royal to guard.
mermwatchtower_noking.trans: 皇帝守卫没有皇帝可以守卫。

quagmire_key_park.en: I'll park it in my pocket until I get to the park.
quagmire_key_park.trans: 在抵达公园之前，就把它“供“在我的口袋里吧。

trap_bramble.en: It'd really poke whoever stepped on it.
trap_bramble.trans: 谁要是踩上去肯定会被戳到。

generic.en: If only I could catch them!
generic.trans: 要是我能抓住它们就好了！

wall_hay_item.en: This seems like a bad idea.

blackflag.en: Gentleman Pirate-Scientist does have a bit of a ring to it.
blackflag.trans: 绅士海盗-科学家这名号还真有点上口。

alterguardian_contained.en: It's draining the energy right out of that monster!
alterguardian_contained.trans: 它正在耗尽那个怪物的能量！

gelblob_storage_kit.trans: 我会保存好自己的判断。

vault_orb.en: I think this plays a roll.

roastturkey.en: I see a big juicy drumstick with my name on it.
roastturkey.trans: 肥美多汁的鸡腿，专门为我做的。

minotaurhorn.en: Wow! I'm glad that didn't gore me!
minotaurhorn.trans: 哇哦！我很高兴那家伙没用角撞我！

held.en: I'll keep a little light in my pocket.
held.trans: 我要在口袋里装一点光。

spoiled_fish.en: I'm not terribly curious about the smell.
spoiled_fish.trans: 我不太想知道那种气味是怎么来的。

burnt.en: I feel like I could have prevented that.
burnt.trans: 我觉得我本可以阻止这种事情发生的。

battlesong_container.en: Wow, it stores so many songs.

animal_track.en: Tracks left by food. I mean... an animal.
animal_track.trans: 食物留下的踪迹。我指的是...一只动物。

wx78module_maxhunger.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.en: That could cause some major destruction.
lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.trans: 那家伙能造成巨大破坏。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.en: You look the same but different.
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.trans: 你看起来相同但又不同。

walterhat.en: I was never exactly "outdoorsy" in my youth.
walterhat.trans: 我年轻的时候也没喜欢过“户外活动”。

oceanfish_small_9.en: Just spit-balling, but I might have a use for you...
oceanfish_small_9.trans: 只是随便说说，不过我应该能让你派上用场……

playing.en: I could calculate the trajectory, but it involves a lot of complicated numbers and squiggles.
playing.trans: 我可以算出弹道，但这涉及到很多复杂的数字和演算。

generic.en: It won't let me play until I give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 它要我给它一些闪亮的东西才让我玩。

oceanfish_small_6.en: You have to sea it to beleaf it.

oceanfish_small_5.en: I can't wait to pop it in my mouth.

oceanfish_small_7.en: I finally caught this bloomin' fish!
oceanfish_small_7.trans: 总算给我抓到开花的鱼了！

oceanfish_small_2.en: I won't win any bragging rights with this one.
oceanfish_small_2.trans: 这条不会给我带来吹嘘的资本。

oceanfish_small_1.en: Looks like the runt of its school.

burning.en: Someone made that strawman eat crow.
burning.trans: 有人让那个稻草人吃乌鸦。

generic.en: All dressed up and no where to crow.
generic.trans: 打扮好稻草人就不会有乌鸦了。

burnt.trans: 有人谋杀了那个稻草人！

oceanfish_small_4.en: A fish this size won't tide me over for long.
oceanfish_small_4.trans: 小鱼小虾，成不了大气候。

firestarter.en: He's gonna flambé the place right down!
firestarter.trans: 他会把这个地方都烧了！

ghost.en: Maybe he was cooking with ghost peppers.
ghost.trans: 它现在用幽灵辣椒做饭吧。

murderer.en: I hope you don't have any half-baked plans to murder me!

attacker.en: Well, this is a recipe for disaster.

reviver.en: Always rely on %s to cook up a plan.
reviver.trans: 总是可以指望%s来做一个计划。

oceanfish_small_3.en: It's a bit on the small side.

chesspiece_klaus.en: Can I invoke the "no holiday decorations" Klaus?
chesspiece_klaus.trans: 我能召唤出“非节日装饰版”的克劳斯吗？

quagmire_trader_merm.en: Maybe they'd be willing to trade.

held.en: Catching one ain't puffin to brag about.
held.trans: 抓到一只，吹嘘一下也不为过。

generic.en: I've never seen a live puffin before!
generic.trans: 我以前从来没见过活的海鹦。

generic.en: Strange, the power is on but this isn't.
generic.trans: 奇怪，电源是开着的，但它却没反应。

record_efs.en: One of their more experimental tracks.

ghost.en: I'd better hurry up and find a heart.
ghost.trans: 赶紧去找颗心脏。

firestarter.en: Let me guess, this has something to do with "preserving the timeline"?
firestarter.trans: 让我猜猜，这与“保存时间线”有关？

murderer.en: Murderer! You won't get any second chances from me!
murderer.trans: 杀人犯！我绝不会给你第二次机会的！

attacker.en: This really isn't the time or place for that, %s!
attacker.trans: 不要这么不分时间，不分场合，%s！

reviver.en: If it wasn't for %s, I'd be history!
reviver.trans: 要不是%s，我就成为历史了！

carpentry_blade_moonglass.trans: 就像我的头脑一样，剃刀般锋利！

dead_sea_bones.en: That's what they get for coming up on land.
dead_sea_bones.trans: 上了岸，结果落得如此下场。

boat_bumper_kelp.en: It won't save the boat from everything, but it sure kelps.
boat_bumper_kelp.trans: 虽然不能解决小船的所有问题，但也起到了海带应有的作用。

wagpunk_bits.en: I bet I could make something incredibly scientific with this.
wagpunk_bits.trans: 我敢打赌，我能用它做出惊人的科学突破。

manrabbit_tail.en: I feel a lil better when I hold one.

houndwhistle.en: This'd stop a dog in its tracks.

batnose_cooked.en: It came out smelling like a nose.
batnose_cooked.trans: 出来的时候，闻到的是鼻子的味道。

beefalotreat.en: A bit too grainy for my taste.
beefalotreat.trans: 就我的口味而言，颗粒感太强了。

burning.trans: 我认为我们现在安全了。

generic.en: The smell is not the most pleasant.
generic.trans: 这味道不是我闻过最好闻的。

uncommon.en: You don't see this kind of design too often.

rare.en: See? Proof that trying the exact same thing over and over will eventually lead to success!
rare.trans: 看到没？重复做同样的事情终究会取得成功，这就是证据！

generic.en: I seem to be getting a lot of these...
generic.trans: 我怎么弄到这么多的这些东西……

collapsedchest.en: The laws of physics have been bent and broken.
collapsedchest.trans: 物理定律遭到了歪曲和破坏。

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: The real prize is the booth we made along the way.
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 真正的奖品是我制作摊位的过程。

alterguardianhat.trans: 它让我看到了无限可能……

compost.en: Food for plants, and not much else.
compost.trans: 植物的食物，派不上别的用场。

empty.en: It's hungry for meat.

cannonball_rock_item.en: This will fit into a cannon perfectly.
cannonball_rock_item.trans: 它能完美地装进炮膛里。

balloonparty.en: How did he get the smaller balloons inside?
balloonparty.trans: 他怎么把小气球放进去的？

winter_ornament.en: Every scientist appreciates a good bauble.
winter_ornament.trans: 每个科学家都会欣赏一个好的玩意。

pepper_oversized.en: A pepper of rather unusual size.
pepper_oversized.trans: 一种大小相当不寻常的辣椒。

cookiecutter.en: I don't like the way it's looking at my boat...
cookiecutter.trans: 我不喜欢它盯着船看的眼神……

wasphive.en: I think those bees are mad.
wasphive.trans: 我看那些蜜蜂都发疯了。

batcave.en: I don't want to wake them.

butterflymuffin.en: We threw the recipe away and just kind of winged it.
butterflymuffin.trans: 我们扔掉了食谱，即兴发挥了一下。

saddle_war.en: The only problem is the saddle sores.
saddle_war.trans: 唯一的问题是会长鞍疮。

perogies.trans: 这些东西味道相当不错。

spidergland.en: It has a tangy, antiseptic smell.
spidergland.trans: 它有一股强烈的防腐剂的味道。

dumbbell_gem.en: I'll conquer this weight with the power of-- ACK! My spine!!
dumbbell_gem.trans: 这点重量，我轻松就能征服——啊！我的脊柱！！

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

yotd_anchor_item.en: Now I can build an anchor.

wobster_sheller_dead_cooked.en: I can't wait to eat you.

ghost.en: I'm seeing double! I'd better concoct a heart for %s.
ghost.trans: 我看到两个！我最好给%s制造一颗心。

firestarter.en: I know you set those flames, %s.
firestarter.trans: 我知道是你点的那些火焰，%s。

attacker.en: %s doesn't have any sharp objects, does she?

reviver.en: %s treats ghosts like family.

shell_cluster.en: I bet there's some nice shells in there.
shell_cluster.trans: 我打赌里面有不少漂亮贝壳。

asparagus_oversized.en: I guess we'll be eating asparagus for a while...
asparagus_oversized.trans: 我想我们会吃一段时间的芦笋了……

mandrake_planted.en: I've heard strange things about those plants.
mandrake_planted.trans: 我听说过关于这些植物的一些奇怪传言。

generic.en: I need to get my carrat up to speed.
generic.trans: 我需要提高胡萝卜鼠的速度。

cookbook.en: I've always been hungry for knowledge.
cookbook.trans: 我对知识的饥饿感从未停止过。

lots.en: The mushrooms have really taken to the log.

snowcovered.en: I don't think it can grow in this cold.
snowcovered.trans: 我认为它在这种寒冷的天气里没办法生长。

stuffed.trans: 那真是许许多多的蘑菇！

rotten.en: The log is dead. We should replace it with a live one.
rotten.trans: 木头死亡了。我们应该用一个活的来替换它。

burnt.en: The power of science compelled it.

empty.en: It could use a spore. Or a mushroom transplant.
empty.trans: 它可以使用一个孢子。或是一个蘑菇移植植物。

mermguard_shadow.en: Just a shadow of their former self.
mermguard_shadow.trans: 这个影子是它从前的自我。

reviving.en: There must be a scientific explanation for this!

shark.en: We may need a bigger boat...
shark.trans: 我们可能需要一艘更大的船……

mandrake_cooked.en: It doesn't seem so strange anymore.
mandrake_cooked.trans: 它看起来没有那么奇怪了。

wagstaff_npc.en: As a fellow man of science, I'm compelled to help him!
wagstaff_npc.trans: 作为科学界的同行，我有义务帮他！

armor_bramble.en: The best offense is a good defense.

boat_ancient_item.en: I guess I'm doing this the old-fashioned way.

dumbbell_marble.en: I've trained my brain to be the strongest muscle in my body.
dumbbell_marble.trans: 我已经把我的大脑锻炼成了我身上最强壮的肌肉。

minerhat.en: A hands-free way to brighten your day.

anchor.en: I wouldn't want my boat to float away.

leafymeatburger.trans: 虽然是素食，但也挺残忍的。

book_elemental.en: I can't make out the text.

latkes.en: I could eat a latke more of these.

generic.trans: 这个金字塔控制着沙子。

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: I much prefer it this way.

goggleshat.en: What a stylish pair of goggles.

generic.en: It's too sticky to walk on.

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: This really is a pop-up carnival.
carnivalgame_shooting_kit.trans: 这还真是个快闪嘉年华。

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: Of course! Combining moon energy with potato energy, why didn't I think of that?
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 对啊！结合月亮与土豆能量，我为什么没有早点想到呢？

ruins_bat.en: It has quite a heft to it.

bird_egg.trans: 一颗正常的、小小的鸟蛋。

moonstorm_static_item.en: It makes my hair do crazy things.
moonstorm_static_item.trans: 它让我的头发产生疯狂的变化。

generic.en: Oh good. The moon mutated it.
generic.trans: 好的，月亮让它产生了变异。

held.en: You're kind of ugly up close.

generic.en: Are carrots supposed to have legs?

lore2.trans: 它蠢蠢欲动的样子真让我发毛。

lore1.en: Looks like he met a dark end...

rock_moon.en: That rock came from the moon.

anchor_item.en: Now I can build an anchor.

atrium_overgrowth.en: I don't recognize any of these symbols.
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 这些符号我一个都不认得。

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: For harvesting salt from the pond.

miniflare.en: I can light it to let everyone know I'm here.
miniflare.trans: 我可以点一发，让所有人都知道我在这。

rabbitking_lucky.en: I should capture it for science!

berries_cooked.en: I don't think heat improved them.
berries_cooked.trans: 我认为加热并没有让它们变得更好。

basalt.en: That's too strong to break through!

mushtree_moon.en: This mushroom tree is clearly stranger than the rest.
mushtree_moon.trans: 这颗蘑菇树明显跟其他的有异。

spiderqueen.trans: 啊啊啊！那只蜘蛛真巨大！

tacklestation.en: Time to tackle my reel problems.
tacklestation.trans: 是时候解决海钓的问题了。

hammer_mjolnir.en: It's a heavy hammer for hitting things.
hammer_mjolnir.trans: 这把敲东西的锤子可真重。

quagmire_turnip_cooked.trans: 做饭就是将科学付诸实践。

raincoat.en: Keeps the rain where it ought to be. Outside your body.
raincoat.trans: 让雨水待在它应该在的地方。你的身体之外。

inert.en: That castle needs a little decoration.
inert.trans: 那座城堡需要装修一下。

generic.en: Yikes! A little too crabby for me.

hungry.en: You need some food and quick, huh?
hungry.trans: 你想吃东西想的不行了？

starving.en: It has a dangerous look in its eye.

greenmooneye.en: That'll keep a watchful eye on the place.
greenmooneye.trans: 那东西会密切关注这地方。

krampus_sack.en: Ew. It has Krampus slime all over it.
krampus_sack.trans: 呕...上面全是坎普斯的黏液。

held.en: I'll keep a little light in my pocket.
held.trans: 我要在口袋里装一点光。

generic.en: That's a sight for spore eyes.
generic.trans: 那是孢子的眼睛看到的景象。

hiding.en: Something's odd here, but I can't put my finger on it.
hiding.trans: 这里有些古怪，但我说不出所以然。

awake.en: Just keep your hand to yourself, alright?
awake.trans: 总之不要伸出你的手，好吗？

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe_cooked.en: It's actually soft enough to eat now.

robot_blueprint.en: This requires a suspicious amount of welding for a sewing project.
robot_blueprint.trans: 对于一个缝纫项目来说，如此大量的焊接工作实在有些可疑。

halloweencandy_7.en: Everyone'll be raisin' a fuss over these.
halloweencandy_7.trans: 每个人遇到这些东西都会激动的。

halloweencandy_8.en: Only a sucker wouldn't love this.
halloweencandy_8.trans: 只有傻瓜才不会爱上这东西。

koalefant_winter.en: It looks warm and full of meat.
koalefant_winter.trans: 它看起来又暖和肉又多。

slurtleslime.en: If it wasn't useful, I wouldn't touch it.
slurtleslime.trans: 要不是有用的话，我才不会去碰呢。

halloweencandy_1.en: The cavities are probably worth it, right?
halloweencandy_1.trans: 就算蛀牙也值得了，对吧？

recharging.en: I guess it needs time to... recalibrate the, uh... time whatsit.
recharging.trans: 我想它需要时间来……重新校准，那个……时间什么的。

generic.en: I bet there's a lot of interesting science inside.
generic.trans: 我打赌里面一定有十分有趣的科学结构。

halloweencandy_2.en: What corruption of science grew these?
halloweencandy_2.trans: 什么样腐败的科学长出了这些东西？

halloweencandy_5.en: My teeth are going to have something to say about this tomorrow.
halloweencandy_5.trans: 明天我的牙齿可能会对此发表意见。

halloweencandy_6.en: I... don't think I'll be eating those.
halloweencandy_6.trans: 我…不认为我会吃那些东西。

wx78module_music.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_music.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

halloweencandy_4.en: They wriggle on the way down.

hungry.en: I hear a tiny stomach grumbling.
hungry.trans: 我听到它的小肚子在咕咕叫。

salty_doghat.en: It only comes with a friend-ship.

ceviche.en: Can I get a bigger bowl? This one looks a little shrimpy.
ceviche.trans: 能弄一只大点的碗吗？这只看起来有点小。

cookiecutterhat.en: At least my hair will stay dry.
cookiecutterhat.trans: 至少不会打湿我的头发。

bananapop.en: No, not brain freeze! I need that for science!
bananapop.trans: 不，别冻大脑！我需要它来做科学研究！

bootleg.en: Somewhere out there, a pirate is missing their bootie.
bootleg.trans: 远方的远方，有个海盗丢了靴子。

deer_gemmed.en: It's being controlled by that beast!

moon_fissure_plugged.en: It's not very scientific... but pretty effective.
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 虽然不科学……但是很有效。

icepack.en: The fur keeps the temperature inside stable.
icepack.trans: 毛皮使包内有保温效果。
