wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: Dreadful... but don't tell her I said that.
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 简直恐怖……但别告诉她是我说的。

upgraded_stacksize.trans: 得到了一个数量级的改进。

burnt.trans: 那个箱子被烧掉了一截。

grass_umbrella.en: My hair looks good wet... it's when it dries that's the problem.
grass_umbrella.trans: 我的头发湿的时候很好看...问题出在干的时候。

boat_ancient_container.trans: “货物”是水手们的黑话，意思就是 “东西”。

lunarplant_husk.en: It's incredibly tough. I could use this!
lunarplant_husk.trans: 出奇的坚硬。我可以用得上！

critter_lunarmothling.en: I keep her around because she's good at mothematics.
critter_lunarmothling.trans: 留着她是因为她对飞蛾学有价值。

bonestew.en: A stew to put some meat on your bones.
bonestew.trans: 能让我的骨头上长点肉的炖菜。

yotb_stage_item.en: It looks like a bit of building is in order.
yotb_stage_item.trans: 看起来要搭建一下才行。

phonograph.en: Oh no, I've seen THAT before.

halloween_ornament_1.en: A spectornament I could hang in a tree.
halloween_ornament_1.trans: 一个可以挂在树上的装饰物。

halloween_ornament_3.en: This wood look good hanging somewhere.
halloween_ornament_3.trans: 这块木头看起来很适合挂起来。

rat.en: You would make an excellent lab rat.
rat.trans: 你能当一只优秀的小白鼠。

burnt.en: My training regimen crashed and burned.
burnt.trans: 我的训练计划灰飞烟灭。

generic.en: This'll get things moving in the right direction.

halloween_ornament_4.en: Almost i-tentacle to the real ones.

lunarthrall_plant.en: It doesn't seem to care about personal space.
lunarthrall_plant.trans: 它似乎不太在乎个人空间。

halloween_ornament_6.en: Everyone's raven about tree decorations these days.
halloween_ornament_6.trans: 最近大家都在热烈讨论树的装饰。

generic.en: I feel like it wants something.

empty.en: I've got to plant something there.

webber_spider_minion.en: I guess they're fighting for us.
webber_spider_minion.trans: 可以说他们是在为我们战斗吧。

nightmaregrowth.en: Those crystals might be cause for some concern.
nightmaregrowth.trans: 这些晶体值得引起我们的警惕。

cutreeds.en: Cut reeds, ready for crafting and hobbying.
cutreeds.trans: 割下的芦苇，可用于合成和消遣。

pinecone_sapling.trans: 它很快将长成一棵大树！

ancient_statue.en: It seems to throb out of tune with the world.
ancient_statue.trans: 它好像在与世界格格不入地震动。

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.trans: 我最好把这个组装起来。

rat.en: The subject's response time is steadily improving!
rat.trans: 对象的反应时间正在稳步提高！

generic.trans: 我们来训练胡萝卜鼠的反应速度！

burnt.en: A small loss to take in the pursuit of science.
burnt.trans: 追求科学的过程中付出的微小代价。

book_moon.en: All this interest in the moon is probably just a phase.
book_moon.trans: 所有这些对月亮的兴趣可能只是阶段性的。

shadowdigger.en: Oh good. Now there's more of him.
shadowdigger.trans: 哦，挺好的。现在不止他一个了。

generic.en: I bet there's all sorts of good stuff down there!
generic.trans: 我敢打赌那下面有各种各样的好东西！

lunarplanthat.en: It makes me look even brighter than usual.
lunarplanthat.trans: 它让我看起来比平时还要聪明。

turfcraftingstation.en: A true scientist is always breaking new ground!
turfcraftingstation.trans: 真正的科学家永远都在开拓新天地！

active.en: With this I can surely pass through space and time!
active.trans: 有了这个，我肯定可以穿越时空！

partial.en: Soon, the invention will be complete!
partial.trans: 很快，这个发明就要大功告成！

generic.en: This appears to be a nexus to another world!
generic.trans: 这似乎通向另一个世界！

chesspiece_toadstool.en: Not really a great stool though, is it?
chesspiece_toadstool.trans: 不能拿来当板凳坐，对吧？

hivehat.en: The world seems a little less crazy when I wear it.
hivehat.trans: 当我戴上它时，这世界似乎少一点疯狂了。

generic.en: It's cute, in a gross kind of way.

greenamulet.en: No base should be without one!

otter.en: You should see the otter guy.
otter.trans: 你去找另外一只水獭看看。

armorwood.en: That is a perfectly reasonable piece of clothing.
armorwood.trans: 那是一件非常合适的衣服。

shadow_forge.en: What dark designs will it bring to life?
shadow_forge.trans: 它会为哪些黑暗设计带来生命呢？

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: These ones are much easier to find.

record_balatro.en: Irresistible! It's like it touches my mind!
record_balatro.trans: 无法抗拒！它仿佛触动了我的心灵！

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: I can put a meal together in a pinch.
quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.trans: 在紧要关头，我可以做出一顿美餐。

chesspiece_bearger.en: It was a lot bigger up close.

ancient_husk.trans: 这里发生过不好的事情。

crabking_cannontower.en: I knew there was mortar these crabs.
crabking_cannontower.trans: 我就知道这些螃蟹会炮制点什么。

stalker.en: The skeleton fused with the shadows!
stalker.trans: 骨架和暗影融合在一起！

dug_berrybush.en: Now it can be taken anywhere.
dug_berrybush.trans: 现在可以把它带到任何地方了。

humanmeat_dried.en: Letting it dry makes it not come from a human, right?
humanmeat_dried.trans: 风干了就不是人肉了，对吧？

moonglass_rock.en: I can practically see my reflection in it.
moonglass_rock.trans: 我都能看到自己的倒影。

scraphat.en: The tip of that hat is almost as sharp as... my mind!
scraphat.trans: 帽尖几乎和我的头脑一样的……锐利！

unwritten.trans: 这块牌子现在是空白的。

firestarter.en: Burning that wasn't very scientific, %s.

ghost.en: Best concoct a revival device. Can't leave another man of science floating.
ghost.trans: 最好弄个复活设备。不能让另一个科学人漂着。

murderer.en: Your existence is an affront to the laws of science, %s!
murderer.trans: 你的存在触犯了科学规律，%s！

attacker.en: Yeesh. Do I always look that creepy?
attacker.trans: 是的。我总是看起来很吓人吗？

reviver.en: %s has expertly put our theories into practice.
reviver.trans: %s很专业地将我们的理论付诸实现。

generic.en: Stars and atoms! Are you my doppelganger?
generic.trans: 星星和原子！你是我的分身吗？

quagmire_goatmilk.en: Good if you don't think about where it came from.
quagmire_goatmilk.trans: 挺好的，只要你别去想它的来源。

remains_eye_bone.en: The eyebone was consumed by fire in the teleportation!
remains_eye_bone.trans: 传送时，眼骨被火焰吞噬了！

remains_glommerflower.en: The flower was consumed by fire in the teleportation!
remains_glommerflower.trans: 传送时，花被火焰吞噬了！

remains_thingie.en: There's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
remains_thingie.trans: 这肯定有个完美的科学解释。

generic.en: All that's left after the fire has done its job.
generic.trans: 火烧完之后剩下的一切。

generic.en: I think tanks are in order.

burnt.en: The science has been lost to sea.

leafymeatsouffle.trans: 这科技是不是有点走偏了？

moon_altar_seed.en: It wants me to give it a home.

generic.en: It uses displacement theory - things go from displace to datplace.
generic.trans: 它遵循位移理论——东西从介个位置移到辣个位置。

beardhair.en: It's only gross when they're not your own.
beardhair.trans: 当它们不是你自己的时候才会恶心。

cookedmonstermeat.en: That's only somewhat more appetizing than when it was raw.
cookedmonstermeat.trans: 只比生吃的时候好吃一点点。

mandrake.trans: 曼德拉草根拥有奇怪的属性。

type3.en: I wonder who the artist is.
type3.trans: 我想知道是哪个艺术家的作品。

potatosouffle.en: I forgot what good food tasted like.
potatosouffle.trans: 我都忘记了可口的饭菜是什么味道！

held.en: Nowhere left to dig, my friend.
held.trans: 没什么可挖的了，我的朋友。

underground.en: Something's under there, searching for minerals.
underground.trans: 下面有个正在寻找矿物的家伙。

aboveground.en: I'd sure like to whack that mole... thing.
aboveground.trans: 我想像打地鼠那样敲昏那只鼹鼠...

alterguardian_phase2spike.trans: 你已经表明了你的观点！

critter_glomling.trans: 多么富有空气动力学的生物啊！

saltbox.en: Just the cure for spoiling food!

burnt.en: I don't think I'll be using it anymore.

walkingplank.en: Couldn't we have just made a lifeboat?
walkingplank.trans: 我们就不能造一艘救生船吗？

merm_tool_upgraded.en: This tool looks a little fishy.
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 这工具看起来有些可鱼。

held.en: He's not very happy in there.

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: Say y'ello to my little friend!
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 快来跟我的小伙伴问好！

winter_ornamentforge.en: I should hang this one over a fire.

picked.en: The bush is working hard on the next batch.
picked.trans: 下一批丛林在努力生长。

withered.en: The heat even dehydrated the juicy berries!
withered.trans: 高温将多汁的浆果脱水！

generic.en: I should leave them there until it's time to eat.
generic.trans: 我应该把他们留到吃饭时间。

barren.en: It won't make any berries in this state.
barren.trans: 在这种状态下，它长不出浆果。

cane.en: Technically walking is just controlled falling.
cane.trans: 从技术上讲，走路就是有控制的跌倒。

sleepbomb.en: It makes snooze circles when I throw it.

empty.en: It's dry as a bone.

sword_lunarplant.en: It's hard not to make sound effects when I wave it around.
sword_lunarplant.trans: 挥舞它的时候，不自觉就想给它配音。

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

maxwelllight.trans: 我想知道它们是怎么工作的。

voidclothhat.en: It makes me feel dark and mysterious.
voidclothhat.trans: 黑暗的神秘感扑面而来。

bird_mutant.en: I think that used to be a crow.
bird_mutant.trans: 我觉得那个以前应该是只乌鸦。

opalstaff.en: It's scientifically proven that gems look better on top of sticks.
opalstaff.trans: 科学方面证明，宝石在棍子的顶部看起来更耀眼。

carnivalfood_corntea.en: Is this drink supposed to be crunchy?
carnivalfood_corntea.trans: 这种饮料本该这么松脆吗？

orangemooneye.en: No one could get lost with that thing looking out for them.
orangemooneye.trans: 有那东西帮忙观望，没有人会迷路。

jammypreserves.en: Probably should have made a jar.

lobsterdinner.en: If I eat it in the morning is it still dinner?
lobsterdinner.trans: 如果我早上吃它，它还算正餐吗？

struggle.en: The chess pieces are moving themselves!

lunarrift_portal.en: All that science hiding inside... and I can't get to it!
lunarrift_portal.trans: 那么多科学藏在里面……而我却无法触碰到它！

slingshotmodkit.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshotmodkit.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

low.en: The fire's getting a bit low.

embers.en: I should put something on the fire before it goes out.
embers.trans: 在火熄灭之前我得加点燃料。

out.en: At least I can start it up again.
out.trans: 至少我能让它再烧起来。

koalefig_trunk.en: Great, now I've got a stuffed nose.
koalefig_trunk.trans: 这下好了，我有个塞得满满的鼻子了。

high.en: That fire is getting out of hand!

low.en: The fire's getting a bit low.

embers.en: That fire needs more fuel or it's going to go out.
embers.trans: 得给那火加油了，或者就要灭了。

burnt.en: I didn't think it could smell any worse...
burnt.trans: 我真没想到它还能发出更糟糕的味道……

generic.en: I can barrel-y stand the smell.
generic.trans: 我真是有点受不了这个味道。

glasscutter.en: I'm not really cut out for fighting.

cattoy_mouse.en: Mice with wheels, what will science think up next?
cattoy_mouse.trans: 给老鼠都安上轮子了，科学家们接下来还会想出什么呢？

winter_ornamentpearl.en: Really fine work considering she has claws.
winter_ornamentpearl.trans: 以她的爪子来说，做工不可谓不精美。

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 一个即将到来的船用保险杠。

lit.trans: 多么鼓舞人心的雕塑啊！

quagmire_goatmum.en: Reminds me of my old nanny.
quagmire_goatmum.trans: 让我想起了我的老保姆。

lit.en: I could stare at it forever... and ever...
lit.trans: 我可以永远盯着它……永远……

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.en: That could help me hit a little harder.
lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 有了它我能攻击得猛烈一点。

chester.trans: 一只小短腿的...箱子，先生。

dumbbell.en: I usually let my mind do all the heavy lifting.

grotto_pool_small.en: The moon water makes the glass grow. That's just science.
grotto_pool_small.trans: 来自月亮的水让玻璃增长了。这就是科学。

burnt.en: It's not a donkey, but it's definitely an ash.
burnt.trans: 马就算烧成灰也不是驴。

empty.en: It gives the colt shoulder unless I offer it something.
empty.trans: 我要是不给供品它就冷落我。

warm.en: It's quite warm and cuddly... for a rock!
warm.trans: 虽然是块石头，但却相当温暖，让人想抱在怀里！

royal_jelly.en: It infuses the eater with the power of science!
royal_jelly.trans: 它给捕食者灌输了科学的力量！

bonesoup.en: No bones about it, Warly can cook.
bonesoup.trans: 沃利骨子里是名好厨师。

mapscroll.en: A blank map. Doesn't seem very useful.
mapscroll.trans: 一张空白的地图。看起来没什么用。

otterden_dead.en: We are taking on a l'otter water.

mutator_spitter.en: Ah, I... just ate! Why don't you give it to one of your spider friends?
mutator_spitter.trans: 呃，我……刚吃过饭！你拿去给你的蜘蛛朋友好吗？

redlantern.en: This lantern feels more special than the others.
redlantern.trans: 这个灯笼感觉比其他灯笼特别。

lureplantbulb.en: Now I can start my very own meat farm.
lureplantbulb.trans: 现在我可以开办我自己的肉农场了。

lowfuel.en: The fuel tank is getting a bit low.

off.en: All quiet on the flinging front.

wx78module_maxsanity.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

barnaclepita.en: Barnacles taste better when you can't see them.
barnaclepita.trans: 你看不见它们是藤壶的时候，它们的味道会更好。

wrong_type.en: It's not the season for that.

burnt.en: Who would do such a thing?

mushroombomb.en: A mushroom cloud in the making!

voidcloth_scythe.en: It makes harvesting so easy, it's scary!
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 大为简化了收割流程，简直可怕！

quagmire_grill_item.en: I'll have to grill someone about this.

spring.en: The Kingdom of the Bunnymen is closed for the season.

generic.en: That must lead to the Kingdom of the Bunnymen.
Aw, what a cute little starfish!
generic.trans: 噢，多可爱的一只小海星！

quagmire_merm_cart1.trans: 里面有什么科学原理吗？

ghost.en: How do you say "I'll get a revival device" in mime?
ghost.trans: 怎样用哑剧动作表示“我要弄个复活装备”？

firestarter.en: Wait, don't tell me. You lit a fire.
firestarter.trans: 等等，不要跟我说。火是你点的。

attacker.en: %s is silent, but deadly...

reviver.en: %s thinks outside the invisible box.

generic.en: I'm sure there's a little sweetness to be found inside.
generic.trans: 不知道里面有没有些许甜蜜。

cabbagerolls.en: The meat hides inside the cabbage to avoid predators.
cabbagerolls.trans: 肉躲在白菜里面躲避天敌。

burning.en: On a scale of 1 to on fire... that's pretty on fire.
burning.trans: 如果要给火爆程度打分……全烧起来了。

generic.en: I wonder how my catch of the day will measure up!
generic.trans: 来瞻仰我今天的海钓成绩吧！

burnt.en: All my bragging rights, gone up in flames!
burnt.trans: 我所有吹嘘的资本全都给烧没了！

quagmire_altar_bollard.en: As far as posts go, this one is adequate.
quagmire_altar_bollard.trans: 就柱子而言, 这根足够了。

fence_electric_item.en: It's not a tree, but it must be planted.
fence_electric_item.trans: 它不是树，但是得栽到地里。

lobsterbisque.en: Could use more salt, but that's none of my bisque-ness.
lobsterbisque.trans: 可以再加点盐，但是不关我的事。

yotr_food2.en: Blue is the most scientific flavor.

palmcone_sapling.en: It has big dreams of being a tree one day.
palmcone_sapling.trans: 它的伟大梦想就是有一天能长成一棵树。

yotr_food1.en: It's made with carrots, so science says it must be healthy.
yotr_food1.trans: 它是用胡萝卜做的，所以科学说它肯定健康。

broken_forgeditem.en: It's broken, but I think I could repair it.
broken_forgeditem.trans: 它破损了，但是我可以把它修好。

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: If only it didn't also smell like a beefalo.
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 要是它闻起来不像皮弗娄牛就好了。

merm_prince.en: They operate on a first-come, first-sovereigned basis.
merm_prince.trans: 他们遵循先到先得的规矩。

deer_antler.en: Was that supposed to come off?

lucy.en: That's a prettier axe than I'm used to.
lucy.trans: 这斧子比我之前用过的那把还漂亮。

whip.en: Nothing like loud noises to help keep the peace.
whip.trans: 没什么比大响声更能带来宁静的了。

frogfishbowl.en: Is that just... frogs stuffed inside a fish?
frogfishbowl.trans: 这是鱼里面塞了只青蛙吗？

mosquitomusk.en: Those suckers will never get me!

walkingplank_grass.en: Couldn't we have just made a lifeboat?
walkingplank_grass.trans: 我们就不能造一艘救生船吗？

ghostflower.en: My scientific brain refuses to perceive it.
ghostflower.trans: 我科学的大脑拒绝相信这一切。

firestarter.en: I'm sure you had a very clever reason for that fire.
firestarter.trans: 我相信你很有理由才点火。

ghost.en: This doesn't seem very scientific, does it, %s?
ghost.trans: 这似乎不太科学，不是吗，%s？

attacker.en: I think %s's planning to throw the book at me.

reviver.en: I have deep respect for %s's practical theorems.
reviver.trans: 我对%s的实践原理深怀敬意。

melted.en: Won't be useful until it freezes again.
melted.trans: 在它再次冰冻之前，没什么用处。

veggieomlet.en: Breakfast is the most scientific meal of the day.
veggieomlet.trans: 早餐是一天中最科学的一餐。

wortox_reviver.en: I can guess what that's fur.

bodypillow_kelp.en: It's soggier than I would like.

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: Aww, just look how its eyes light up when it sees me!
mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.trans: 快看，它一见到我眼睛都亮起来了！

featherfan.en: Down, to bring the temperature down.

recharging.en: It's doing "time stuff", that's the technical term.
recharging.trans: 它在做“时间之类的东西”，这就是它的术语名。

generic.en: I bet there's a lot of interesting science inside.
generic.trans: 我打赌里面一定有十分有趣的科学结构。

handpillow_petals.en: At least it smells nicer than the beefalo pillow.
handpillow_petals.trans: 起码比皮弗娄牛枕头好闻。

generic.en: WX-78 really puts a piece of themselves into their work.
generic.trans: WX-78真的把自己的一部分投入到了工作中。

open.en: I bet there's all sorts of things to discover down there.
open.trans: 我敢打赌在那下面肯定能发现各种各样的东西。

full.en: I'll have to wait until someone leaves to enter.
full.trans: 我会等到有人离开进入。

mutator_water.en: Oh wow, that looks um... delicious, Webber!
mutator_water.trans: 哦，哇，这看起来嗯……很好吃，韦伯!

rocks.en: We could make stuff with these.
rocks.trans: 我们可以用这些做点东西出来。

kitcoon_deciduous.en: Aren't you the cutest little cat thing!
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 你就是最可爱的小猫咪！

archive_moon_statue.en: These magnificent moon statues have me waxing poetic.
archive_moon_statue.trans: 这些宏伟的月亮雕像让我充满了诗意。

peghook.trans: 那家伙喷出来的东西有腐蚀性！

molehill.en: What a nice, homey hole in the ground!
molehill.trans: 多么美好舒适的地洞啊！

vault_teleporter_underconstruction.en: "This Waymark is under development for a future update."
vault_teleporter_underconstruction.trans: “此路标是未来更新的内容，目前正在开发中。”

chesspiece_deerclops.en: It feels like its eye follows you.
chesspiece_deerclops.trans: 感觉它的目光在跟着你。

saltlick_improved.en: Just looking at it makes me thirsty.
saltlick_improved.trans: 光是看着它我就觉得口渴了。

lots_of_flowers_evil.en: It gives me a bad feeling.

some_flowers.en: A few more flowers should do the trick.
some_flowers.trans: 多拿些花来应该就可以了。

generic.en: Some flowers would liven it up a bit.
generic.trans: 弄点花会显得更有生机。

quagmire_swampig.trans: 这是一头超级多毛的猪。

cookedsmallmeat.en: Now there's no reason to worry about getting worms!
cookedsmallmeat.trans: 现在我不必担心会生虫子了！

dock_kit.en: Everything I need to build a dock for my boat.
dock_kit.trans: 这里有为小船建造一个码头所需的一切。

fig.trans: 我管它叫“牛顿的无花果”。

mast_malbatross.en: Spread my wings and sail away!

wobster_den.en: It's a rock with Wobsters in it.

bomb_lunarplant.trans: 植物学和化学一起奏效。

amulet.en: I feel so safe when I get to wear it.

generic.en: It's cute, but it's not ripe yet.

withered.en: Nothing will grow in this heat.
withered.trans: 这么热的天气什么也生长不了。

generic.en: I think those are the edible kind.

barren.en: I think it needs to be fertilized.

turnip_cooked.trans: 做饭就是将科学付诸实践。

magician_chest.en: Why am I starting to feel a bit uneasy...?
magician_chest.trans: 为什么我开始感到有点不安了……？

fence_gate_item.en: All we need to build a nice, sturdy gate.
fence_gate_item.trans: 有了它就能造出一个美丽牢固的大门。

walkingplank_yotd.en: Dressing it up doesn't make me feel better about using it.
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 不管怎么装扮我在用它时都不会感觉良好。

mushroomhat.en: Makes the wearer look like a fun guy.
mushroomhat.trans: 让穿戴者看起来像一个有趣的家伙。

minifan.en: Somehow the breeze comes out the back twice as fast.
minifan.trans: 不知道怎么回事，风以两倍的速度从后面吹来。

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: This will help me see all the science hiding in the dirt.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 它将帮助我看到所有藏在泥土里的科学。

stump.en: Where'd the tree go? I'm stumped.
stump.trans: 那棵树哪去了？真是一桩谜题。

generic.en: It's full of delicious, delicious sap.
generic.trans: 它含有大量美味可口的树液。

playing.en: That target's really starting to bug me.
playing.trans: 这个靶子让我心痒痒了。

thulecitebugnet.trans: 有人抓到最新的蜂巢了吗？

winter_ornamentlight.en: A tree's not complete without some electricity.
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 一棵树没有电流就不算完整。

lava_pond_rock.en: As gneiss a place as any.

tomato.en: It's red because it's full of science.

hermit_pearl.en: I'll take good care of it.

wall_moonrock_item.trans: 非常轻盈，但出人意料地坚硬。

spider_whistle.en: I don't want to call any spiders over to me!
spider_whistle.trans: 我可不想引来任何蜘蛛!

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: This feels a bit heavy handed.

maxwelllock.en: Looks almost like a key hole.
maxwelllock.trans: 看起来就像一个钥匙孔。

rabbithat.en: It'll put hare on your head.
rabbithat.trans: 这个帽子会把兔子放在你的头上。

empty.en: I need to put a torch in it.
empty.trans: 我需要在里面放支火把。

crimson.en: I have a nasty feeling about this...

waiting_for_dark.en: What could it be? Maybe I'll sleep on it.
waiting_for_dark.trans: 会是什么呢？不然睡一觉起来再看。

cooldown.en: It needs to cool down after that.

spawn_disabled.en: I shouldn't be bothered by anymore prying eyes now.
spawn_disabled.trans: 我应该不会再被窥视的目光所打扰了。

enabled.en: Am I on the other side of the rainbow?!
enabled.trans: 我到了彩虹的另一边了吗？！

generic.en: Looking at it makes my head feel fuzzy... or... blocky?
generic.trans: 看着它让我的头感觉很模糊，好像有很多小方块。

kelp.en: It gets my pockets all wet and gross.
kelp.trans: 把我的口袋全弄湿了，好恶心。

lavaarena_spawner.en: This is where those enemies are coming from.

lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.en: My strikes would hurt a little more wearing that.

icehound.en: Are there hounds for every season?

generic.en: Turns out a key was the key to getting in.

sleeping.en: I'd better not be here when he wakes up.
sleeping.trans: 他醒来的时候我最好不要在这里。

quagmire_beefalo.en: Science says it should have died by now.

generic.en: It's even heavier than it looks.

struggle.en: The chess pieces are moving themselves!

woby_treat.en: I think I'm barking up the wrong tree with this snack.
woby_treat.trans: 这个零食恐怕不是给人吃的吧。

generic.en: To bee or not to bee.

multiplayer_portal.en: This ought to be a scientific impossibility.

record_worktobedone.en: One of their more experimental tracks.

potatosack.en: It's either filled with potato-shaped rocks or rock-shaped potatoes.
potatosack.trans: 不是装满了土豆形状的石头，就是石头形状的土豆。

turf_cotl_brick.en: Bricks are the building blocks of the floor.
turf_cotl_brick.trans: 砖块是地板的组成部分。

poison.en: It looks unhappy about me stealing those birchnuts!
poison.trans: 看来偷桦栗果惹火了它！

generic.en: It's all leafy. Most of the time.
generic.trans: 满是阔叶。大部分时候是这样的。

burnt.en: I feel like I could have prevented that.
burnt.trans: 我觉得我本可以阻止这种事情发生的。

wagstaff_item_1.en: Strange, this glove is not a projection.

mermwatchtower_regular.en: They seem happy to have found a king.
mermwatchtower_regular.trans: 他们找到了国王后高兴了起来。

generic.en: The spiders thought this one was important.
generic.trans: 蜘蛛们觉得这个很重要。

lumpy_sapling.en: How did this tree even reproduce?

bedroll_straw.en: Looks comfy, but it smells like mildew.
bedroll_straw.trans: 看起来挺舒适，但闻起来一股霉味。

oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.en: Where there's a quill, there's a way.
oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.trans: 这么漂亮的羽毛，见过没。

book_light.en: Whoever wrote this must've been pretty bright.
book_light.trans: 写这本书的人头脑相当灵光。

lost_toy_42.en: I'm sure there's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
lost_toy_42.trans: 一定有一个完美的科学解释。

lost_toy_43.en: I'm sure there's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
lost_toy_43.trans: 一定有一个完美的科学解释。

wobster_sheller_dead.trans: 这烹饪出来应该挺不错的。

armor_voidcloth.en: Oh drat, there's a tear across the front!
armor_voidcloth.trans: 哦，糟糕，前面撕开了一个口子！

winter_ornamentboss.trans: 这一个尤其令人印象深刻。

tacklesketch.en: A picture of some fishing tackle. I bet I could make this...
tacklesketch.trans: 某种钓具的图片。我打赌我自己就能做……

waterpump.en: It puts out fires very a-fish-iently.

support_pillar.en: I should really get around to fixing that.
support_pillar.trans: 我得尽快抽出时间来解决这个问题。

dirtpile.en: It's a pile of dirt... or IS it?

taffy.en: If I had a dentist they'd be mad I ate stuff like that.
taffy.trans: 如果我去看牙医了，他们知道我这样子吃东西的话会疯掉的。

mast_yotd_item.en: Now I can build a mast.

antler.trans: 多么引人注目的一个鹿角啊！

generic.en: Is it staring at me? ...No, I guess not.
generic.trans: 它是不是盯着我？…不，我猜没有。

cooking_long.en: That meal is going to take a while.
cooking_long.trans: 这顿饭需要一点时间了。

empty.en: I bet there's nothing in there.
empty.trans: 我打赌里面什么都没有。

lost_toy_10.en: I'm sure there's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
lost_toy_10.trans: 一定有一个完美的科学解释。

generic.en: That's how we got here. Hopefully how we get back, too.
generic.trans: 能过来，应该也能回去吧？

portabletent.en: I feel like I haven't had a proper night's sleep in ages!
portabletent.trans: 我感觉已经几辈子没睡过好觉了！

lost_toy_11.en: I'm sure there's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
lost_toy_11.trans: 一定有一个完美的科学解释。

lost_toy_14.en: I'm sure there's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
lost_toy_14.trans: 一定有一个完美的科学解释。

hermitcrabtea_foliage.en: Don't worry, I won't go crazy with it.
hermitcrabtea_foliage.trans: 别担心，我不会狂喝不止。

generic.en: Now I can show everyone what I found!
generic.trans: 现在我可以让大家伙看看我找到什么了！

thulecite_pieces.en: It's some smaller chunks of Thulecite.

durian_oversized.en: I'm sure it'll make an even bigger stink.

stale.en: It's creating what we scientists call a chemical reaction!
stale.trans: 它在制造我们科学家所说的化学反应!

spoiled.en: That stomach-churning smell means it's working!
spoiled.trans: 那股令人作呕的味道说明它起作用了!

generic.en: Now we wait for science to do its work.
generic.trans: 现在我们就等着科学来做它的工作。

mutateddeerclops.en: It's got a little something in its eye.
mutateddeerclops.trans: 它的眼睛里有一点东西。

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: I should really get around to fixing that.
support_pillar_dreadstone.trans: 我得尽快抽出时间来解决这个问题。

has_loot.en: I otter have a closer look.

generic.en: Otter den that, there's not much else there.
generic.trans: 除了一个水獭窝，再没什么别的了。

generic.en: That toadstool's just asking to be cut down.

empty.en: Just a hole in the ground.

pandoraschest.en: It may contain something fantastic! Or horrible.
pandoraschest.trans: 里面可能有很好的东西！也可能是可怕的东西。

lavaarena_bernie.en: He might make a good distraction for us.
lavaarena_bernie.trans: 我们或许能利用他进行干扰。

bernie_big.en: Remind me not to get on Willow's bad side.

spidereggsack.en: I hope these don't hatch. Period.
spidereggsack.trans: 我希望这些不会孵化。仅此而已。

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: It's got the look of someone eager to show their work.
wx78_scanner_succeeded.trans: 它有一种迫不及待向世人展示自己作品的急迫。

empty.en: We can make stone sculptures with this.
empty.trans: 我们可以用这东西来做个石雕。

has_item.en: Oh, that's where I left it.
has_item.trans: 哦，我把东西落在这里了。

minotaur.trans: 那家伙看起来不太高兴。

lavaarena_rechargerhat.en: Those crystals will quicken my abilities.
lavaarena_rechargerhat.trans: 那些水晶的力量加速了我的能力。

lost_toy_18.en: I'm sure there's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
lost_toy_18.trans: 一定有一个完美的科学解释。

lost_toy_19.en: I'm sure there's a perfectly scientific explanation for that.
lost_toy_19.trans: 一定有一个完美的科学解释。

support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.en: It's all under wraps for now.
support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.trans: 目前一切都处于保密状态。

elixir_container.en: That's more of a mortician's bag than a basket.
elixir_container.trans: 与其说是篮子，不如说是殡仪员的袋子。

mandrakesoup.en: Well, he won't be waking up again.

playing.en: I think we've all learned a lot here today.
playing.trans: 我想我们今天都在这里学到了很多东西。

monkeyisland_portal_debris.trans: 奇怪，这套设备看起来怎么眼熟呢……

jellybean.en: One part jelly, one part bean.
jellybean.trans: 一部分是果冻，一部分是豌豆。

wx78module_taser.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_taser.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

madscience_lab.en: Sanity is a small price to pay for science!
madscience_lab.trans: 为了科学就算疯了又如何！

prime_mate.en: A nice hat is always a clear indicator of who's in charge.
prime_mate.trans: 一顶漂亮的帽子总能清楚地表明谁是老大。

generic.en: I'm not sure which way it vent.
generic.trans: 我也搞不清楚它朝哪排气。

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

charlie_hand.trans: 它想要某种可怕的东西。

generic.en: They don't seem like Winona's usual style.
generic.trans: 跟薇诺娜一贯的风格多少有些出入。

saddle_wathgrithr.en: Wigfrid made that? Looks like she winged it.
saddle_wathgrithr.trans: 那是薇格弗德做的？这个让她猛虎插翅。

burnt.en: That's not a real roasted carrot.
burnt.trans: 那可不是真的烤胡萝卜。

buried.en: He's trapped under all that junk.
buried.trans: 他被困在那堆垃圾下面了。

wagstaff_machinery.en: There might be some discoveries to be made in this pile of junk.
wagstaff_machinery.trans: 在这堆垃圾中也许会有所发现。

tacklecontainer.en: This extra storage space has me hooked!
tacklecontainer.trans: 这件额外的储存工具钩住了我的注意力。

freshfruitcrepes.en: Sugary fruit! Part of a balanced breakfast.
freshfruitcrepes.trans: 甜水果！营养均衡的早餐的一部分。

boat_cannon_kit.en: It's not a cannon yet, but it will be.
boat_cannon_kit.trans: 现在还不是大炮，不过将来会是。

bearger.en: What a bear of a badger.

dustmeringue.en: Who or what would eat this?

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

bandage_butterflywings.en: This bandage is really winging it.
bandage_butterflywings.trans: 都上绷带了，可得小心翼翼。

warm.en: I'm headed in the right direction.

generic.en: It's some kind of homing device.
generic.trans: 它是某种自动引导装置。

some_kelp.en: I think I could fit some more kelp in there.
some_kelp.trans: 我觉得里面应该还能放一些海带进去。

generic.trans: 看起来好悲伤，一条海带都没……

yotb.en: I wonder what the Judge would say about this?

generic.trans: 科学的配方使其具有最大的可拥抱性。

moon_altar_glass.en: It doesn't want to be on the ground.

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: It looks like there's some assembly required.

generic.en: It is not functional as a standalone unit.
generic.trans: 单独使用无法发挥功能。

kitcoon_nametag.en: I should think of some names! Let's see, Wilson Jr., Wilson Jr. 2...
kitcoon_nametag.trans: 我应该想几个名字！叫什么呢，小威尔逊，小威尔逊2号……

statueharp_hedgespawner.en: The flowers grew back, but the head didn't.
statueharp_hedgespawner.trans: 花长回来了，但头却没有。

quagmire_park_obelisk.trans: 一座有纪念意义的纪念碑。

playing_card.en: It's fifty-one short of a deck.
playing_card.trans: 还差51张就够凑齐一副牌了。

chesspiece_pipe.en: That was never really my thing.

ancientfruit_nightvision.en: I just wish it was less... twitchy.
ancientfruit_nightvision.trans: 要是能少……抽搐一点就好了。

slingshot_band_pigskin.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

bundle.trans: 我们的物资都在那里面！

pickledherring.en: You won't be herring any complaints from me.

oceanfishingbobber_robin.en: Hopefully it won't attract any red herrings.

generic.en: It's even more science-y than the last one!

burnt.en: The extra science didn't keep it alive.
burnt.trans: 再多的科学也不能使它幸免于难。

burnt.en: Whatever it was, it's burnt now.
burnt.trans: 不管它原来是什么，现在已经烧掉了。

burnt.en: Fire doesn't really solve naming issues...
burnt.trans: 火并没有真正解决命名问题...

moon_altar_crown.en: I fished it up, now to find a fissure!
moon_altar_crown.trans: 我钓上来的，现在去找个裂隙吧！

slingshot_frame_wagpunk.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

moon_altar_astral.en: It seems to be part of a larger mechanism.
moon_altar_astral.trans: 它似乎是一个更大机制的一部分。

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: I think it's about to hatch...

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: After rigorous testing, I can confirm that they make me want to take a nap.
alterguardian_phase3trap.trans: 经过不懈测试，我可以确认它们让我想打盹。

humanmeat_cooked.en: Cooked nice and pink, but still morally gray.
humanmeat_cooked.trans: 煮的粉嫩，但在道德上还是灰色地带。

generic.trans: 咦嘘！我不要亲吻那东西！

wolfgang_whistle.en: It gives me terrible flashbacks to the gym classes of my youth...
wolfgang_whistle.trans: 它让我回忆起了小时候糟糕的体育课……

bernie_active.en: That teddy bear is moving around. Interesting.
bernie_active.trans: 泰迪熊在四处溜达。好好玩。

dug_monkeytail.en: I wonder if they're edible? Maybe an experiment is in order.
dug_monkeytail.trans: 不知道能不能吃？看来要安排一个实验了。

turf_cotl_gold.en: Don't walk on that, it was expensive!
turf_cotl_gold.trans: 别踩在那上面，那个很贵的！

cutgrass.en: Cut grass, ready for arts and crafts.
cutgrass.trans: 割下来的草，可用于制作和合成其他东西。

saddlehorn.en: This could take a saddle off.

firestarter.en: Didn't anyone teach you not to play with fire?!

ghost.en: %s is looking greener around the gills than usual.
ghost.trans: %s鱼鳃周围比平时更绿了。

attacker.en: %s is looking especially monstrous today...

reviver.en: Why thank you, %s!

barnaclesushi.en: I still seem to have misplaced my chopsticks.
barnaclesushi.trans: 我的筷子好像还是放错了地方。

lunar_grazer.en: It must have come through that strange rift!
lunar_grazer.trans: 它一定是通过那个奇怪的裂隙来的！

chesspiece_minotaur.en: Now you're the one scared stiff!
chesspiece_minotaur.trans: 现在轮到你被吓得一动不动了！

wx78module_nightvision.en: So much science packed into one tiny gizmo.
wx78module_nightvision.trans: 一个小玩意竟然装得下这么多的科学知识。

tumbleweed.en: Who knows what that tumbleweed has picked up.
tumbleweed.trans: 谁知道那个风滚草里裹着什么。

w_radio.en: Hm. There's a lot of science here.

purplemooneye.en: Makes a good marker, but I wish it'd stop looking at me.
purplemooneye.trans: 是个很好的标记物，但我希望它不要再那样看我。

burning.en: That's what I call a firebird.

needsfertilizer.en: I think it needs to be fertilized.

burnt.en: I don't think anything will grow in a pile of ash.

generic.en: I should try planting some crops.
generic.trans: 我应该试着种一些庄稼。

uncarved.en: It's no gourd to wear without a face.

slingshot_handle_jelly.en: Walter's really giving it his best shot.
slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 沃尔特真是拼尽全力了。

archive_resonator_item.en: Aha! I used the secret knowledge to build a device! Why does this feel familiar...
archive_resonator_item.trans: 啊哈！我运用秘密知识建造了一个设备！为什么这种感觉似曾相识呢……

moonbutterfly_sapling.en: A moth turned into a tree? Lunacy!

succulent_picked.en: I could eat that, but I'd rather not.
succulent_picked.trans: 我能吃那个，但我不想吃。

festivefish.en: I wouldn't mind sampling some seasonal seafood.

kitcoon_marsh.en: I must collect more... for research!
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 我必须多收集点……做研究！

recharging.en: It's doing "time stuff", that's the technical term.
recharging.trans: 它在弄“时间之类的东西”，这就是它的术语名。

generic.en: I bet there's a lot of interesting science inside.
generic.trans: 我打赌里面一定有十分有趣的科学结构。

tamales.en: If I eat much more I'm going to start feeling a bit husky.
tamales.trans: 我要是再多吃一些，也许会变得健壮了。

following_other.en: Who's in charge? Have you herd?
following_other.trans: 现在谁领头？你听说了吗？

dragonfruit_oversized.en: I half expect it to sprout wings.
dragonfruit_oversized.trans: 我还有点期待它会长出翅膀呢。

pigskin.en: It still has the tail on it.

hammer.en: Stop! It's time! To hammer things!
hammer.trans: 停下！是时候了！用锤子敲点东西吧！

guacamole.trans: 阿伏伽德罗最喜欢的菜。

wagpunkbits_kit.en: Machines that fix other machines! What will science think of next?
wagpunkbits_kit.trans: 机器修理别的机器！科学接下来还会想出什么？

voidcloth_boomerang.trans: 我能了解一下这个的退回条款吗？

wagdrone_beacon.en: This will help keep things contained.
wagdrone_beacon.trans: 这将有助于把东西控制住。

dumbbell_bluegem.en: You can't get much cooler than that.

nightsword.en: Why would anyone make this? It's terrifying.
nightsword.trans: 为什么会有人做这个？太可怕了。

playing.en: Not to brag, but I've been called a bit of an egghead in the past.
playing.trans: 不是我吹牛，我是这方面的行家。

generic.en: It won't let me play until I give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 它要我给它一些闪亮的东西才让我玩。

oar_monkey.en: It really puts the paddle to the battle.

voidcloth.en: Those shadows are all cut from the same cloth.
voidcloth.trans: 那些暗影都是从同一块布上裁下来的。

monkey_mediumhat.en: I think it makes me look very dashing and captain-like.
monkey_mediumhat.trans: 戴上以后我就变得潇洒，有船长范儿了。

occupied.trans: 让我们来美化一下这头皮弗娄牛！

burnt.en: I styled my beefalo in the hottest fashions... and paid the price.
burnt.trans: 我用最火的风格打扮了我的皮弗娄牛……然而也付出了代价。

generic.en: There's no beefalo here to groom.
generic.trans: 没有皮弗娄牛让我打扮。

walrus_tusk.en: I'm sure I'll find a use for it eventually.
walrus_tusk.trans: 它最终肯定能派上用场。

burnt.trans: 现在它是一棵被烧焦了的针刺树。

generic.trans: 那些尖刺看起来很锋利！

cave_banana_tree.trans: 怀疑它能不能光合作用。

potatotornado.en: Potato, scientifically infused with the power of a tornado!
potatotornado.trans: 土豆，科学的融合了龙卷风的力量！

firestarter.en: Don't burn yourself out, %s.

ghost.en: Does "universal" coverage include the void, %s?
ghost.trans: %s，“宇宙”包括虚无吗？

beaverghost.en: Will you bea-very mad if I don't revive you, %s?
beaverghost.trans: %s，如果我不复活你，你会生气吗？

murderer.en: Murderer! Bring me an axe and let's get in the swing of things!
murderer.trans: 凶手！来把斧子，我们砍起来！

attacker.en: %s has been a bit of a sap lately...

gooseghost.en: Be more careful, you silly goose!
gooseghost.trans: 以后长点心，你这头蠢鹅！

beaver.en: %s's gone on a wood chucking rampage!
beaver.trans: %s在疯狂的砍树，根本停不下来！

reviver.en: %s saved everyone's backbacon.

bundlewrap.en: Wrapping things up should make them easier to carry.
bundlewrap.trans: 把东西打包起来应该会容易搬一点。

eggplant_oversized.en: I still don't see any resemblance to an egg.
eggplant_oversized.trans: 真想不通它为什么叫茄子。

mushgnome.en: It might be aggressive, but only sporeradically.
mushgnome.trans: 它也许会周期性的发起攻击。

alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.trans: 你破坏的科学还不够多吗？！

carnival_seedpacket.en: I was feeling a bit peckish.

mutatedwarg.en: What big, glowing eyes you have!
mutatedwarg.trans: 瞧你那双闪光的大眼睛！

generic.en: Hmmmm. I guess that'll have to do.
generic.trans: 呃。我想只能将就着用了。

oceantree.en: I think these trees are a little lost.

oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.en: Some fish might find this a-luring!

trinket_41.en: It's a little warm to the touch.

trinket_40.en: Holding it makes me feel like bartering.
trinket_40.trans: 拿着它让我觉得在赶集。

trinket_43.en: It's not very good at jumping.

trinket_42.en: It's full of someone's childhood memories.
trinket_42.trans: 它充满了某人的童年记忆。

trinket_45.en: It's picking up frequencies from another world.
trinket_45.trans: 它正在接收另一个世界的频率。

trinket_44.en: It's some sort of plant specimen.

trinket_46.en: Maybe a tool for testing aerodynamics?
trinket_46.trans: 也许是测试空气动力学的工具？

mermarmorhat.en: It won't fit me. It's a merm helmet.
mermarmorhat.trans: 这个不适合我，这是一个鱼人头盔。

handpillow_beefalowool.en: If only it didn't also smell like a beefalo.
handpillow_beefalowool.trans: 要是它闻起来不像皮弗娄牛就好了。

book_web.en: I'm not scared of spiders! I'm not!
